212.3:
<caption = ''>The story event "Beaches, Bathing Suits & Blazing Trails" will start on Oct 14 at 22:00 (UTC) !

During the event, you can train Umamusume to obtain Event Points and Prize Coins, which let you unlock story episodes, event-exclusive Support Cards, and more!

Event previews now come with voice lines!
Once the event reward collection period ends, preview voice recordings can be played by going to Story > Extras from the Home screen.</caption>

<caption = 'Event Period'>Available: 22:00 Oct 14 - 21:59 Oct 27 (UTC)</caption>

<caption = 'Important Information'>1. For more information, check the notice posted after the start of the event or the Help button at the top-right of the event page.
2. Event duration and content are subject to change without prior notice.</caption>

gratitude! When I'm sad, you cheer me
up as much as eating a carrot would! I
hope you'll accept this token of my thanks!

When it snows back home, the whole world
goes white... I'll never forget that view.
I wanted to share it with you in chocolate
form. May we both find the scenery we seek.

been honored with a homemade treat from
ME, so you better savor it! ♪ Oh, and tell
me how you liked it, okay?

me. Cookies keep well, so I hope their
longevity rubs off on our journey.

228.1: This song really gets me going! Getting to sing this song is like proof you're number one in Japan! So I've gotta try harder!
228.2: My mom loves this song! She said it's the one that made her cry the most when she saw me singin' it... Hehe.
228.3: Ooh, I like this song too!
228.4: Oh, I remember doing this song... It was giving me trouble, but Air Groove was kind enough to help out.
228.5: This song takes all the weight off my legs. I feel like I could just take off and run forever and ever...
228.6: This song... seems like it could be pretty good to run to.
228.7: This song always makes me feel much braver. ♪ It won't be easy getting to where I wanna go!
228.8: The legend of the invincible Teio goes on! You and I are never gonna stop runnin' for our dream. ♪
228.9: Hey, what song are you thinkin'? I'm in a good mood, so lemme show ya my special Teio step. ♪
228.10: Must be nice to have a rival always by your side... Just thinking about it gets my heart pumping. ☆
228.11: The chorus is totally rad! Singing it is like zooming down the road at top speed!
228.12: Look at all these hip tunes! I bet these would be totally fly at the disco too. ☆
228.13: An endless dream is what I hope to show my fans. And you as well, of course! Do look forward to it.
228.14: This takes me back to my beginnings... when I stepped off the stage and onto the turf.
228.15: Which song is your favorite? I'd love to know!
228.16: The dance solo gets my heart racing. I... don't mind this feeling.
228.17: If there comes a future day when I overcome all my limits... what then? I can't wait to find out.
228.18: Thinking about what song to pick made me hungry...
228.19: This song reminds me of that old saying: "Two times a winner, double the chicken dinners."
228.20: Even while we were recording this, Scarlet and Vodka were going at it. Luckily, I had my fishing net on hand.
228.21: Cue some bangers, 'cause it's time to play flounder othello!
228.22: No speed, no life! I'm gonna keep my engines firing, and you're coming along for the ride!
228.23: The chorus is so sick! You can really feel the "smoldering embers" of Brian's soul!
228.24: Hey, this thing has all the coolest songs. Wanna listen?
228.25: Winning is obviously important, but dancing alongside your rivals is, well... I don't hate it.
228.26: Don't read too much into the lyrics, you hear? It's not how I actually feel. Like, at all. Got it?!
228.27: All the songs here are worth a listen!
228.28: A mile seems long, but you can blink once and it'll all be over... Time flies on the track!
228.29: I was listenin' to this after school with my friends! First Urara started dancing, then Fukukitaru and Rice, and then we all rocked out together!
228.30: I can't help swayin' to the beat! Hey, Trainer, shall we dance?
228.31: Only a select few will ever reach that next frontier... Hehe. No path could be more rewarding, if you ask me.
228.32: We all have our own reasons for running, but ultimately our hopes all come down to one thing: winning.
228.33: Please, feel free to browse as long as you'd like. I think I'll get some tea ready. ♪
228.34: My fighting spirit doesn't die down after the race is over! Favorite, long shot, whoever—we'll duke it out on stage!
228.35: She's tough, all right. Eats anxiety for breakfast. Which makes beating her all the more worth it!
228.36: Teach, sing with me! I'm not taking no for an answer!
228.37: To take the desire to rise above and turn it into the strength to run... That is what this song means to me.
228.38: Gold Ship is really just nothing but trouble! ...Though I am grateful she helped me practice.
228.40: Instinct versus instinct, clashing on the course! Ring the bell, 'cause a battle royale is about to begin!
228.41: Whose legend? El's legend! Whether it's spring, summer, fall, or winter, El is the world's strongest!
228.42: The melody, the beat, the excitement! Let's enjoy this music together!
228.43: Down this perilous path I walk, toward my promised throne at the top! O, to possess such strength and beauty must be a sin!
228.44: On that fateful day when I performed this song, racing history—nay, the entire world lurched forward into a new dawn!
228.45: Even now I hear it... a chorus of praise for the overlord!
228.46: I don't need titles. I run to win... That'll never change.
228.47: No more doubts... Watch me. I'll show everyone who I am.
228.48: How long are you going to take? Hurry up and choose.
228.49: I'm rather fond of such displays of passion on stage as hoisting the microphone, stand and all. Heh, does that surprise you?
228.50: Music... muse sick? No. Hmm... Oh, don't mind me.
228.51: What? A smile is simply part of the performance, and an important one at that. Of course I'd have it down perfectly.
228.52: Take your time. It's a difficult choice, what with so many masterpieces.
228.53: No way. This song was literally made for all of us who just want to "witness" Uma greatness! Thank you, URA... I could cry...
228.54: Wait, is this... the gateway song that so many non-believers got Uma-pilled on? It's so peak!
228.55: Are you gonna play your oshi's song? I'm all ears!
228.56: No one likes a predictable race. It's all about telling destiny who's boss and shocking the crowd.
228.57: Ahh, a song of hopeful beginnings. Maybe I'll set out on a journey of my own... into the land of dreams.
228.58: Oh, you taking a break too? Well, kick back and put on some tunes.
228.59: A clash of destinies... I have no intention of ceding center stage, but I suspect neither of them do either.
228.60: I'll always be there to take your hand, so long as you offer it. That's what an older sister is for.
228.61: Now then, which song will you choose? I'm curious to see your tastes.
228.62: I love this song. ♪ The stage looks like a cake, and you get to make a heart with your hands—it's so cute!
228.63: Tehe. ♪ Every song gets my heart racing when I'm listening with you. Funny how that works!
228.64: Passion... I felt it with both mind and body... its true meaning.
228.65: This takes me back... I can't believe it's been so long... Wonder how that owl's doing...
228.66: Ah... My friend likes that one too...
228.67: Win or lose, you only get to stand on those stages once. The emotions of such moments can only be expressed through song and dance.
228.68: ...Her prayer will be answered. I can't analyze why, but I am sure of it.
228.69: Commencing Operation Audio Sample... These are fascinating sound waves.
228.70: I want to shine just like them and set a special record of my own... All right, it's bulking season!
228.71: Hey, you should try lifting while you listen to music. You'll get fit, and have fun while doing it!
228.72: A full-out clash of speed, and smiles at the end of the stretch... Ingredients for the perfect sumo stew!
228.73: Ohh, there are so many good songs! ♪ It's like music à la mode!
228.74: I've made my choice... I'm going to go down this path, and bring happiness to all!
228.75: When they were composing this song, the artists interviewed me... They really respected my feelings.
228.76: Hehe, I don't even know where to begin. Which one's your favorite?
228.77: Hehe, I don't even know where to begin. Which one's your favorite?
228.78: Blinding speed... Do they mean the speed of light, perhaps? Yes, that's it... we can learn from photons and their constant ways!
228.79: The electronic beeping comforts me. Just like the brain wave measurements I took while listening to this—pure euphoria!
228.80: Oh, keep browsing. I'm just gathering some data.
228.81: The choreography is really hard! I went all out shaking my tail and then... Aghh, just thinking about it hurts!
228.82: Taishin and Hayahide are always there for me when I need a good cry! That's what lets me keep barreling forward!
228.83: I like songs that hit you with a "bang!", but songs that are like "bam!" are cool too, don't you think?!
228.84: I too have a dream deep in my heart. Until that crown of glory is in my hands, I won't let anything stop me.
228.85: Toll... ♪ All these songs are so wonderful, I don't know which to choose.
228.86: I'm gonna run down the stretch hardest of all, and cross the finish with the cutest smile! My dream is right there in the lyrics. ♪
228.87: Everyone's been using the intro as music for their Umasta stories lately. Guess who started the trend. ♪
228.88: What do you wanna listen to? Maybe you could pick out a cute song for me. ♪
228.89: What do you wanna listen to? Maybe you could pick out a cute song for me. ♪
228.90: "Even if the whole world turns against us..." This part always makes my heart skip a beat. ♪ It's perfect for a princess and her prince!
228.91: This song reminds me of the day I made up my mind to become a princess... those first steps of mine.
228.92: My, what a delightful song! It's got me itching to throw a few punches!
228.93: I like how bubbly the song is overall, but like... do we really have to shake our tails like that?
228.94: Huh, guess I'll get to see what you're into. Well, don't keep me in suspense.
228.95: Hryahh! Wahh! Woohoo! Well, what do you think? I tried putting the song's emotions into words—with some Bakushin flair!
228.96: C'mon, Trainer, sing it with me! Bakushin Bakushin Bakushin! Okay, again! Count to 894!
228.97: Concerts should be studied for just like tests! Let's Bakushin to the music!
228.98: With you by my side, I can overcome any race. I'll prove that to you. ♪
228.99: Time for some music. ♪ Which song is your favorite?
228.100: I won't let anything get in the way of my running or my singing. ♪ That's how an Umadol rolls. ☆
228.101: I really like the album cover too. ♪ That's something you have to pay attention to as an Umadol!
228.102: I uploaded an UmaTok of this dance and it exploded! Actual peak choreography.
228.103: This song really hits right now... Been going through some stuff with the gals. I should probably apologize, shouldn't I...
228.104: I'm gonna do my nails, so can you put on something upbeat?
228.105: I'll prove that I'm the fastest! That I deserve to stand center stage!
228.106: I was listening to this with Ticket and she broke down crying all of a sudden... Never a quiet moment with her.
228.107: Just pick what you want. I'm fine with whatever.
228.108: Un... unlimited... impact? Oh, I get it! Like kaboom! Right?
228.109: Umapyoi, umapyoi. ♪ This song's fun when we all sing it together! Pyoi, pyoi, pyoooi!
228.110: My favorite is... Hehe. All of them!
228.111: As long as the Great Shiraoki is watching over me, I can make destiny my own!
228.112: I'm so lucky I get to spend these shining days surrounded by friends... Fortune must be on my side!
228.113: Woiya... Haiya... Which will be your lucky song?
228.114: I got to do a concert with Opera O... hehe. I-I kind of want to dance more. I know that's silly, but...
228.115: The goddess of victory would never notice me... B-but if I keep trying, maybe I'll have a chance one day!
228.116: Which song is your fray... fav... fraywit? Ahh, I'm sorry!
228.117: For the life of me, I can't dance this with a serious face. My default expression is so relaxed, you know? I dunno, I just like... ughh!
228.118: Trying to get some youthful passion in your system? Or are you saying you want to run for your dreams with me? ...That was a joke.
228.119: This kinda reminds me of home. My parents used to play a lot of these at the bar... It takes me back.
228.120: The tempo befits a first-rate runner, and the fastest one at that. It's like this song was made for me!
228.121: The song is busy, but that's part of the charm. I hear it whenever I get together with Spe and co, so it's burned into my brain now.
228.122: Ohoho! I grant you permission to choose a song of your liking!
228.123: Oh... Didn't know you liked this kind of music. Hmm, I guess you've got decent taste.
228.124: Oh, so this is the kind of music you listen to. Mind if I join you?
228.125: Won't you take me on a musical adventure?
228.126: All-you-can-listen?! F'real?! Get picking then—we gotta get our money's worth!
228.127: "Music is the bean paste to the bun of your heart." I want to know what flavors you like!
228.128: Any recommendations, Trainer? It might be fun to look into the song's history together.
228.129: ...If you want to clear your mind, having a song play in the background is better than sitting in silence.
228.130: From festive fun to tender tears, there's a song for every occasion!
228.131: Ooh, this makes me want to burst out in song! C'mon, let's do a duet!
228.132: Elegant, touching, and splendidly cheerful... All elements that make this song perfect for a winning concert.
228.133: I love this song. ♪ The precise choreography lets me express myself down to my very fingertips.
228.134: Performing this song live gets me fired up—literally! The dancers at the edges always get a little singed... Ha, just kiddin'!
228.135: This song reminds me of a blooming flower bud... Like it's the starting line to the dream ahead!
228.136: To sing this on stage amidst the thunderous music and dazzling lights... There could be no greater honor.
228.137: This song is special, so... If you're going to listen with me, no talking until it's over.
228.138: Hearing this song brings back memories of close races and festive concerts. It makes me want to break into a run!
228.139: I always gotta squeeze the mic real hard when performing this! It's just so cool!
228.140: I've come to associate this song with memories of sparkling, passionate races. Hehe, it makes me want to run! ♪
228.141: We've practiced this song so much at karaoke it's become a specialty. ♪ Next chance we get, we'll sing it for you.
228.142: This song's a banger, am I right? I love the way it makes me feel like I'm the wind, just like when I'm runnin'.
228.143: Talk about some touching lyrics! Makes you think of all the people who've helped you get this far...
228.144: A wonderful, inspiring song. It helps me believe in the time I've spent at this academy, as well as the days to come! ♪
228.145: I have to sing this at the next karaoke sesh! In fact, I'll message Nature, Ikuno, and Turbo right now... ♪
228.146: I recall enjoying this song in the passenger seat of Maruzensky's car. It brings to mind runners cutting a dashing figure, no?
228.147: Oh hey, I sang this with Falco and Fine at karaoke. They even taught me the moves!
228.148: There are so many fun songs it's hard to pick! ♪
228.149: La la la la... ♪ Oh, dear. Was I perhaps a beat slow?
228.150: Get ready! What do you do when Falco runs?! One, two... "Chase her! Chase her!" Ehe, thanks! ♪ That was perfect! ☆
228.151: Wow, what a great selection! Which song do you recommend, Trainer? ♪
228.152: Yo, get back here and listen to this! I'm gonna dye your eardrums Golshi-colored, baby! ☆
228.153: All of these songs make my heart sing. Which one do you like, Trainer?
228.154: When I'm listening to music, I feel like I can run forever! Which song do you want to run to?
228.155: Hey, nice song choice. You've got good taste.
228.156: Are we taking requests? Hit me with something that'll make me wanna dance!
228.157: Whoa, this song's great! I can feel the magic bubbling up in me already!
228.158: Music's... fine, I guess. Helps drown out the noise.
228.159: Each time I listen to this song, my mind jumps straight to thinking of my rivals!
228.160: A passionate concert—so hot it melts the snow—right after the final race of a long winter. How fitting.
228.161: This song's so cool and mature. I better practice lots so I can dance alongside the others without holding them back!
228.162: With speed as swift as an arrow in flight, I shall seize victory—and then you shall witness the dance into which I have poured my soul!
228.163: No matter how beat I am after a race, this is the one song I'll always dance to perfectly!
228.164: Imagine if I performed as the center for this song. Hehe, I bet everyone would be shocked. Oh, hey! They call that "getting hyped," right?
228.165: Listening to this makes me wanna run that heart-pumping race all over again. I'm gonna go see if I can find the others!
228.166: The lyrics have it right—when I've got a rival in front, I feel like overtaking her nooo matter what! I'm overflowing with magical power just thinking about it! ♪
228.167: Gathering data, running simulations... When it comes to "orchestrating destiny," I'm sparing no effort.
228.168: This song really kicks my engine into overdrive. I wanna run so bad I can't stay still!
228.169: Like the song says, even when your luck's down, you can't give up! It's called a happy ending 'cause you gotta get through all the rest first! ☆
228.170: That day, when we performed this, I felt something special. I hope you felt something special from me too, Trainer. ♪
228.171: Now that's a trendy track. ♪ I think I'll put it on while I'm cleaning. It'll really brighten up the room!
228.172: We came up with the lyrics for this song together—me and everyone! Ehehe, can you tell who wrote which parts?
228.173: Sweat, tears, honest hard work—it takes all that and more to be sparkly cute! ☆ I'm gonna do my best today, too!
228.174: Fate picks a different song for us depending on the time of day! Fun, right?
228.175: Gosh, what a hip song! I can't wait t'be the kinda city girl who matches it!
228.176: Oh, this song is très magnifique! I wonder what kind of dance would go with it?
228.177: Whoa, are you telepathic? How'd you know what song Machan wanted to listen to?
228.178: Hmm hm-hm hmm. ♪ What a pleasantly light sound. Like the breeze from a bird's wingbeats...
228.179: This your kind of music? Moving stuff.
228.180: My, there are so many songs to choose from. I'm afraid the latest trends are hard for me to keep up with—what do you recommend?
228.181: A story narrated by the notes of myriad songs... Would you like to listen too, Trainer?
228.182: I can improvise lyrics about Tomakomai city to any melody. That's my special skill.
228.183: DJ Heliboss in the house! Come on everybody, put your hands up!
228.184: Full speed straight ahead, woo! I can't wait to sing with the girls again—it's gonna be so lit! ♪
228.185: The wish to "reach" one's rightful place—and the will and resolve to race towards it—is the cornerstone of an unwavering stride.
228.187: This song is special to me. Precious, you could say. It rouses a gale in my heart that never dies down.
228.188: You better pick a super cool song worthy of the magnificent Windy!
228.189: Huh, so you're picking this song? Nice. It feels like a solid choice for my current mood too.
228.190: I want a song I can turbo boost to! Put it on full blast! Yeah!
228.191: Now this is a song made for a city gal. How could you not adore it? One day, I wanna be just as snazzy and full of glam when I sing it!
228.192: That one time I got really into the dance break and cartwheeled right into the wing of the stage... The crowd was so hyped that day!
228.193: To understand the worldview of the song, I conferred with and honed my instincts. Now, it's time for a workout.
228.194: The gale that sped across the turf now blows a melody through our hearts, so that it may share the speediest joy with us.
228.195: You know that bit of choreography where you point your pinky at the audience? I always aim mine at the jaded ones... Getting a response out of them means I've won.
228.196: Songs these days are so fast and difficult to follow. But I want to sing this song with care, so I'll just have to evolve. ♪
228.197: The straightforward and powerful lyrics and melody make me feel like the protagonist in an epic tale. They give me courage.
228.198: That's right, you're a witness to Tomakomai's great advancement! Now c'mon, we're gon' promote the fairest town in Hokkaido!
228.199: Oh this tune goes hard! Especially when you wanna pop off and turn the speed up to eleven! Let's gooo! ♪
228.200: Sear it into memory? Nah! Now a bite's something you'll never forget! You'll always remember to keep your eyes on me!
228.201: I've no intention of halting my steps. There's no limit to the sights you can see when you're free. So I'll keep going. What about you?
228.202: Umadacchi! ♪ Umadacchi! ♪ Come on Trainer, dance with me! Umapyoi! ♪ Umapyoi! ♪
228.203: Whenever this song comes on at a party, I just know it's going to be a lucky ☆, exciting day filled with happiness! ♪
228.204: Hmm, hmm, hmm... ♪ Oh, dear. I'm swaying unconsciously to the beat. Hehe, and what a wonderful smile you have.
228.205: An amazing choice for a holiday song! If you feel the sparkle while listening to it at home, then that means the Tomakomagic is working!
228.206: A wish that transcends time... As the one who bears it forward, my resolve is stronger than ever. Remember that every time you hum this song!
228.208: I listened to this song while walking along the river. Before I knew it, I'd reached the sea. I'd say this song is perfect for an afternoon stroll.
228.209: If I make a music video, it's gonna have a lot of neon green! Oh, and a megaton of sparkly effects! And it'll feature me traveling to different worlds!
228.211: My dance lessons spanned a multitude of genres, so I'm quite used to hearing songs like this one.
228.212: I... don't dislike music. However, I'm not an expert. So, what songs do you like?
228.213: Nothing lifts your spirits like listening to a song you love! What's your favorite song? ♪
228.214: Frequency in sync with Inner Wavelength. In other words, "CHRD" struck, Transmission successful.
228.215: Top Road and I performed this song the other day at the theater! The theater of karaoke, that is!
228.216: Opera O keeps hounding me to sing this song with her, saying "Let us put on a special ensemble performance with this song as the pièce de résistance!"
228.218: So many wonderful songs to choose from. ...Oh, that won't do. If I get distracted, I'll end up listening to these all day.
228.219: Music is the glass that further elevates a fine wine and adds a sparkle to conversation—the highest grade of aperitif, if I may.
228.220: Songs are filled with precious memories. ☆★ What song will you pick, Trainer? What memories does it hold for you?
228.221: I love powerful songs that get the blood pumping. The ones that feel amazing when you sing from the diaphragm!
228.222: So, this is the kind of music you like? Hmph... No, I don't mean anything by it. Heh.

128.1001: A high-energy song perfect for the URA Finals. Let me hear you shout! Umapyoi! ♪ Umapyoi! ♪
128.1003: The two of us can do anything together! Listen to this song brimming with energy and cheer up! ☆
128.1004: Our rivalry is what brought us together... And now there's no stopping us! Never looking back!
128.1005: A song only those who wear the Triple Tiara can sing. A flowery song filled with determination.
128.1006: The first song sung by Umamusume after their debut. Echo forth! Fanfare!
128.1007: A refreshing song sung by rising stars in their junior year. The racers' dreams sparkle brilliantly.
128.1008: Only those who keep their eyes on the prize will reach the NEXT FRONTIER. The crown awaits...
128.1009: A powerful song for those who power through and win the day. Not even a raging storm will stop them.
128.1010: As if flowers will bloom from this very tune, this music captures the beautiful moment of a G1 triumph. Chase your dreams, and they will come true!
128.1012: Whether we're racing or just running for the fun of it, we give the track everything we've got! We gathered up all the unique dreams we have, and put them into this song, so let's go! Starting gate!
128.1013: The stars above light our path ahead—leading to a brilliant future. This song is dedicated to everyone who supported us on this journey!
128.1023: Sometimes we fight, and we don't know how to make up. But deep down, we'd rather be smiling together. No matter how blue or bitter we feel, that's just part of being friends—and this song is a reminder of that!
128.1024: Stuffing memories from both past and present into this treasure box... The future is now! It's time to share this love with the whole world!
128.1025: A song where the brightest star can shine, one of bravery and hope. An exciting new feeling... A signal of new beginnings.
128.1026: A song filled with a fleeting yet strong will. With a wish in her heart, she makes a plea to the moon.
128.1027: They vowed to be the fastest! The racers, running beyond their limits, follow their instincts and shout!
128.1028: A song those who wear the Classic Triple Crown can sing. Performing this is every racer's dream.
128.1029: I wanna win with you. Holding their dreams close, these girls take to the stage and shine—brighter than any of the lights around them.
128.1030: Watching you encourages me to race on to victory! An energetic song about enjoying every moment!
128.1031: An intense song about the storm of emotions that captivates racers. It's impossible not to give in.
128.1032: A refreshing song performed with a rival. Placing your dreams in another, a new story begins...
128.1033: An aspirational song full of hope shining brighter than the countless stars above. You can see them too, right?! All those sparkling dreams!
128.1034: The life of a racer is full of ups and downs, smiles and frowns... so we squeezed all the big, wacky adventures of Tracen life into one itty-bitty song! ♪
128.1035: Now that I know I never was alone... A song that celebrates the smiles and tears born of friendship.
128.1036: Our harmonious song that surpasses the bounds of seasons, turning beating hearts into rhythm... This is how I finally get to see everyone!
128.1037: What lies beyond the goal? What unique scenery is there to see there? This song blends wonder and warmth, gently encouraging you to keep on running.
128.1040: This song shines with all that makes youth so dazzling—friendship, rivalry, tears, smiles, doubt, and hope.
128.1041: An invigorating song representing the girls' hard work. Their dreams will shine on—now and forevermore. Now, together will we go!
128.1042: This song is about the dreams we have, and the resolve it takes to keep running toward them. It's about moving forward, even when you're lost or scared. If you ever lose your way, we're here to tell you, "Go this way."
128.1043: This one's the story of two Umamusume. Out in the freezing rain, they huddled together and made a promise—"It's not over yet—we still can shine, if our dreams are on the line and you're by my side..."
128.1044: Don't stop till you're a top Umadol! All you need to sing this song are a mic, a splash of cuteness, and an infectious smile! ☆
128.1046: These "Running☆Sisters" will dash straight through your heart! I mean, that's the key to love! Right?
128.1047: A soothing song to lull you to sleep—with the perfect amount of energy for when you're tired or feeling down. Got a problem with that?
128.1048: We all start in the same gates. The path opens to any who would run it—so go! Surge ahead, with the tailwind urging you on!
128.1049:
Bakushin! Bakushiiin! BAKUSHIIIIIIN! This song was written by Bakushin for Bakushin, and I hope it will inspire some BAKUSHIIIN in you too!
—Comment from Class Representative
128.1050: Our first anniversary... We really poured all our gratitude into this song. It's about reaching our dreams, and finding new inspirations beyond them. We'll keep running with you, further and further!
128.1051: Dreams come to those who run on! An ode to the radiance of youth and all the tears and smiles it brings.
128.1053: Let the beat take over as you dance to this hot summer song under neon lights. Don't take your eyes off me—whether I'm on stage or in a race!
128.1054: A passionate song celebrating the racer's hard-earned victory. May her cries be forever etched into history.
128.1055: Look! Is it a ship?! Is it a UFO?! No, it's Golshi! Peace, peace! ♪ How'd you like that? No one's safe from the Golshi takeover! ☆
128.1056: A stately choral piece befitting of the prestigious Mejiro family. The glory of the Mejiro name knows no bounds—not now, not ever.
128.1057: With sweat and tears glistening, this Umadol uses her sparkling cuteness to prove that hard work pays off! ☆
128.1058: A brilliant song that spans generations—with a history that continues to this very day. We'll keep running toward an even brighter future!
128.1059: A shocking song for both friends and competitors. To make everyone happy, we'll keep running—over and beyond the finish line!
128.1060: A heroic song that symbolizes a brighter future. We set sail in search of but one treasure—our dreams! An unknown ocean awaits us!
128.1061: Where there are rivals, there is comfort! A cozy and relaxing song full of the academy's most enjoyable moments! ♪
128.1062: A thrilling song born out of overwhelming anticipation. ♪ This melody is just for you—witness this special dream!
128.1063: A promise made is a promise kept. My ashen resolve will shine brighter than anything—and anyone.
128.1064: It doesn't matter how far I must run. I'll grasp victory with my own two hands—with my unbreakable resolve to rise above all others.
128.1065: A healing melody expressing gratitude. I want to respond to all my supporters with love—I'll be with you every step of the way.
128.1066: A fierce song for fighters. No matter how the wind blows, I'll press forward in the name of victory—because that's how I roll.
128.1067: A pure song overflowing with emotions of longing. There's so much I still yearn for. Even this race—I refuse to lose.
128.1068: A fervent song about a determined soul. I won't let this dream end. I'll do whatever it takes for however long—no matter what.
128.1069: A glass ballad imbued with prayers for a sparkling moment of life. One that fiercely burns not in the future, nor in the past—but now.
128.1070: A liberating song reminiscent of a gentle breeze. Its melody is light and graceful—at times changing direction, but showing no signs of stopping.
128.1071: My heart won't stop pounding, which means it's time to fly! ♪ Next stop—the one I admire! Ready for takeoff! ☆
128.1072: Emotions I can't erase and dreams I can't give up on—as long as I am me, I'll keep singing until the most stubborn of cherry blossoms bloom!
128.1073: Wahey heyyy! It's time to blast these vibes with this fire track! ☆ Let's see some smiles, 'kay? I'll shine like the sun—so you all better pop off, too! ♪
128.1074: An edgy but oddly comfy song. Don't you ever forget about the trying times we shared together, okay?
128.1075: Hey, everybody! Get excited—it's time for Golshi's rap! I say Golshi, you say rap! Golshi! Rap! Golshi! Rap!
128.1076: A story spun by first-magnitude stars will surely shine the brightest. These desires will pass down and become dreams for another.
128.1077: Though today was just another normal day, it was just as important as any other. Let's hug our pillows and dream of tomorrow. But for now, good night.
128.1078: An energetic song meant for the dear friends running alongside you. I refuse to lose, so I need your help—now more than ever before!
128.1079: Proof of having championed the Classic Triple Crown. Enjoy this club remix of the song Umamusume aspire for.
128.1081: When rivals cross paths, that can only mean one thing—it's time to passionately run to the top with emotions high!
128.1086: These unbelievably cool upper tones fill the entire year. Your partner will make your personality shine. -BoC'z
128.1087: A zesty song for all the Umamusume girlies! Our bond is unbreakable! Umafriends☆4ever!
128.1096: You are the one and only dancing queen. The crystal ball said so. ♪ Just keep your heart thumping and get out there! Embrace the fever! ☆
128.1097: Dye this world in your vivid colors. Now, bop to the tune of this pop song with a light shining ever bright!
128.1098: Though seasons change, my time with you feels like an eternity. I hope it stays this way forever—with colors unfading.
128.1099: Chasing the stars above, these young girls dash to new heights. There is only one path forward—and it goes up! The sky is the limit!
128.1100: What's up, girls? It's time to get pumped up! ♪ I'll show you all the ultimate fanfare!
128.1101: Are you ready?! Once you start, there's no stopping! Just run to the rhythm and don't look back!
128.1102: I may be small, but within me is a dream as vast as the Tomakomai skies! I want to tell you more and more about the place I love! ♪
128.1103: Warming your heart like the rays of the sun. But there's no need to rush. We'll make our dreams come true, one step at a time.
128.1104: I want a future that I can only achieve with you—one that's more than theoretical. We'll turn our bond into power and run toward our destiny.
128.1105: Running alone, my mind is filled with frustration and the sharp pain of each step. But I refuse to stop—even if my chances are below zero.
128.1106: You have a duty to fulfill—sharpen your mind and work yourself up with passion. Only then can you overcome your limits and grow super strong.
128.1107: This is a once-in-a-lifetime chance to shine. You'll stumble, but don't give up. Dash toward your dreams with determination and courage!
128.1108: We really get along, so it's okay if there's a bad day here and there! ☆ Luck, happiness, and victory will all be ours! ☆
128.1109: Fill your cup with fortune and embrace chaos! The forbidden fruit lies beyond the impossible. This is the beginning of a legendary catastrophe!
128.1110: No more rules. Faster than the speed of light. With you as my hidden reagent, all will be clear, and my plan A will come to fruition.
128.1111: I can't help it when I'm standing next to the one I admire! It's true that I feel down from time to time, but in the end, I'll pull through!
128.1112: Praise the Overlord! Rejoice as you witness this heart-stirring moment! She will go down as the one who achieved impossible glory!
128.1113: Silently do I run—in hopes of fulfilling a promise once made. Shining like a first-magnitude star, I offer my victory to the night sky.
128.1114: I'll overcome all obstacles—because your cheers are the fire that keeps me going! I'll make my dreams come true—no matter what!
128.8501: BGM for the StarHorse TV news program. If you hear this song start playing, it's time to find out what's new with StarHorse4!
128.8502: You can't have a StarHorse allowance race without this fusion tune. An homage to the evolution of the series.
128.8503: If this song plays during your debut, you know you're in for a show! Getting this song to play is a goal for any StarHorse4 player.
128.8504: BGM that plays during breeding in StarHorse4. Craft your ideal pedigree at your leisure with this relaxed tune.
128.8505: BGM that plays during breeding in StarHorse4. The music seems to grow along with your horse and pairs well with the cutscenes.

163.1052:

163.1061: Ohoho! My name is King Halo. As a first-rate competitor, you can naturally expect great things from me. Rest assured, King Halo will be a household name soon enough.

163.1064: I'm Mejiro Palmer! How ya doing? I'm always around if you need me, so don't be shy! ♪

163.1067: My name is Satono Diamond. There's no such thing as fate. I intend to race my way into a bright shining future of my own making!

163.1069: I-I'm Sakura Chiyono O! My dream is to stand on the same stage as my hero! And I will make my dreams blossom!

163.1072: I am Yaeno Muteki. As a student of the Kongo Yaegaki style, I am always in search of honorable opponents with whom to race. Let us fight fair and square!
163.1073: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi here! I've always dreamed of winning the Triple Crown, and now I'm going all out to—cough, cough! I-I'm all right, just choked on air. Really, never felt better!
163.1074: ...Oh? Is it time for self-introductions already? Teehee! My name is Mejiro Bright, and I will strive to live up to the Mejiro family name.

163.1078: I'm Yamanin Zephyr... My goal is to be like the wind... running faster and more freely than anything. That's what I aspire to be.

163.1084: The name's Tanino Gimlet! I'm here to find the most ideal version of myself. Life's too short to live as a pale imitation! So kick down the walls, smash them to pieces, and run for Valhalla!
163.1085: Greetings. I am Daiichi Ruby. To be ever supreme is the duty of our house. With this calling as my guide, I shall go forth, undaunted.

163.1087: I'm Machan. Aston Machan. One day, I'll be a mascot worthy of the world, so keep your eyes steady on me.

163.1094: I'm Jungle Pocket. If it's a race you want, it's a race you'll get. Not that you'll be taking the top spot from me anytime soon.

163.1104: Katsuragi Ace, at your service! Don't be afraid to chase your dreams! I'll help you bust down those claustrophobic walls!

163.9004: Hello. I'm Aoi Kiryuin, a new trainer here at Tracen Academy. I'm still learning as I go, but I'll do my absolute best!
163.9005: Sasami Anshinzawa, (apprentice of a) legendary acupuncturist, at your service! With one little poke, I'll have you ready to take on the world! Wow, right? No worries! ☆

184.1099: The TP gauge is full. I'll leave up a reminder, so feel free to call on me for training anytime!
184.1100: Your TP gauge is full, dearie. Training's best when you do a little bit every day. See you out there.
184.1104: Hey, check out that full TP gauge! Time to go all in, Trainer!
184.1105: Trainer, "TP Gauge" now at maximum capacity. All signals are "Go" for training.
184.1106: Ah, it looks like the TP gauge has refilled. Well... shall we train?

185.1001: Our RP is full again! I need to get out there and race so I can be the best in all of Japan!
185.1002: Our RP has fully recovered. I kind of wanted to race, but... would that be okay?
185.1003: RP has been fully restored! ♪ Hehehe! I know you want to see the Invincible Teio race, right?
185.1004: Looks like our RP is all full! Ya wanna get goin'? Whether it's my car or on the racetrack, I'm rrrraring to go!
185.1005: Oh... It looks like our RP filled up while I was waiting. Hehe, then you better get ready for the show of a lifetime.
185.1006: Looks like our RP has filled up... Can you put me in a race? I really want to give you a win.
185.1007: 1 unread message from Her Majesty Queen Golshi. Subject: RP is full. Get your butt back here!
185.1008: Hey, Trainer! Our RP's full! Just let me know which race you want me to tear up!
185.1009: Trainer! Our RP is full again! And I swear... I WILL take first place in the next race!
185.1010: Well, lookie here! Our RP's all full! Trainer, hurry on back now! I've got a race to win! ♪
185.1011: It seems our RP has been fully restored. I've completed all race preparations. Just give me the word. ♪
185.1012: Yeah! The RP tank's all full! Heck yeah! Who wants to go one-on-one?!
185.1013: Our RP is back at maximum. Please... allow me to bring home a victory for the Mejiro clan.
185.1014: RP! MAX! Muy bien! This condor is ready to fly down the track!
185.1015: Our RP has been fully restored. But worry not. An Overlord never rushes into competition.
185.1016: Our RP is full. Put me in a race. Now.
185.1017: RP has been fully restored. As long as I have goals to accomplish, I will continue our journey to the top.
185.1018: Our RP has fully recovered. Have you given some thought to which race I should compete in?
185.1019: Aaaasdfjgkltrainerlook! Our RP is full! Let's go scope out the best angles to simp from!
185.1020: Our RP is close to bursting. Now leeet's seeee... which trick should we play next? ☆
185.1021: You're sittin' on max RP! Don't lettem go ta waste, yeah? I've got more energy'n I know what ta do with!
185.1022: It appears you've got max RP. ♪ Now then, would you mind escorting me to the race?
185.1023: It looks like our RP is full. What equation should we use in our next race? I can't wait to hear your opinion.
185.1024: Our RP's all full! Can I race? C'mon, can I? Hee hee, Maya's ready for lift off! ☆
185.1025: Your RP is full... And also, you, um... probably shouldn't open any windows until the shadows pass...
185.1026: Reporting in. RP has been fully restored. Competition possible. I await your orders.
185.1027: Looks like our RP is all full! When do I race? Don't forget to factor in warm-up time!
185.1028: Ooh, I'm stuffed! You've got max RP, so let's go run until we work my appetite back up!
185.1029: Oh, goodness me! The RP gauge is full! I can't help it—my heart goes all pitter-pat before a race...
185.1030: RP's full! I-I will also... d-do my b-burst! Ah... I messed up...
185.1031: Woohoo, RP's all filled up! Can't wait to get out there and run!
185.1032: RP has been fully restored... Looks like we can enter a race. Hmm. Which sample should I take?
185.1033:
RE: Your RP
It's full. I'll be waiting at the track.
185.1034: Hey hey, our RP's all full! Time to show everyone what the great Inari can do!
185.1035: YES! Our RP is full! YEAH! IT'S. TIME. TO. RACE!
185.1036: Hey, our RP's maxed out. Gotta see if my race simulations are accurate.
185.1037: Our RP has been fully replenished. This is a good opportunity to apply what we've learned.
185.1039: YOU'VE got max RP, and I'VE got max princess power! Let's go crush some races! ♪
185.1040: What? Our RP is full already. What're you waiting for? Let me race, geez...
185.1041: Class representative here! RP has been fully restored! Now... praise me for my fine reporting skills!
185.1042: Hehe, it appears the RP gauge is maxed out. Okay! I'm going to SHINE in the next race too!
185.1043: Mrgh! RP's full! I'mma tear up the track!
185.1044: Our RP's full. What are you waiting for? I wanna test my race-winning spell!
185.1045: Oh, wow! Our RP is full again! I'm always ready to work hard for you! ♪
185.1046: Ta-dah! RP is all charged up! I'm sooo taking center stage in this next race! ☆ Woohoo! ♪
185.1047: "With the fairies' blessing, the hero's RP was replenished. The time for battle against formidable foes would soon be upon her." (vol. 6, p. 261)
185.1048: Oh, hey. Your RP is all full. Guess I'll go ahead and like, get ready to run or whatever?
185.1049: RP's full. Come on, let's give the crowd a nail-biter.
185.1050: Our RP is full. So? Are we racing or not?
185.1051: Our RP's filled up. I'll do my best to wow you with my performance!
185.1052: Did you hear? Our RP is full! Hooray! That means, um... I can race a whooole bunch!
185.1053: The RP gauge is full! That means it's time for a SHOWDOWN!
185.1055: Hey, the RP gauge is maxed out! ☆★☆ Which means we can enter races and create marvelous moments! Isn't that marvelous?! ★☆★
185.1056: I heard our RP is full! My fortune tells me it's time to race, heh heh. ♪
185.1057: I see the RP gauge is full. We ought to take advantage of that and run as much as we can!
185.1058: The RP tank is all full! Okay. I'm NOT going to trip until I make it to the race―gaaah!
185.1059: Your RP is fully recovered. Hurry and let me run... so I can get stronger...
185.1060: Oh, it looks like our RP is full up! I guess it's time for all the youngsters to start racing!
185.1061: Our RP is full! Now, time to claim a victory fit for a king!
185.1062: Ta-daaa! ♪ Your RP is all ready to rock 'n' race! Let's go, go, go!
185.1064: Our RP's maxed out. Time to kick some butt!
185.1065: LANE message: T-Rain! It's your girl, Heliboss! RP's maxed out! Finna race, wanna come?
185.1066: RP's full! C'mon! Lemme run! Lemme ruuuuun!
185.1067: Look how full our RP is! Won't you let me race? Please!
185.1068: It looks like your RP is full! Let's head to the racecourse and liven things up—just like a festival!
185.1069: Your RP is in full bloom! Can we enter a race? I want to show you how hard I've been training!
185.1070: So, the RP gauge is full. I'm prepared to run, which means there's only one thing for you to do.
185.1071: Pardon me, but you seem to have reached maximum RP. Shall we go show everyone a race to remember?
185.1072: Our RP has filled up! Allow me to demonstrate the fruits of my labor on the track!
185.1074: We've fully recovered our RP. Shall we head out after we finish our tea?
185.1076: Hey, the RP gauge is full! Now, let us bloom proudly on the track!
185.1078: Your RP gauge is completely filled. Come, it's time to become the wind that blows across the turf.
185.1083: Report: Max RP reached. On standby for next race.
185.1084: The RP gauge is replete. Come! The hour of destruction is upon us! Let us go forth, unto the battlefields of racing!
185.1085: The RP gauge is full. Now is the time to amass victories and carve our names onto the halls of glory.
185.1087: Breaking Machan News—RP's full. Yay. Now we can race.
185.1098: Look, we've got max RP! Let's race and bring more happiness to everyone today! ☆
185.1099: Your RP gauge has filled up! Time to take to the stage! Everything I do... is to promote Tomakomai!
185.1100: Will you look at that. The RP gauge is full. Why don't we fill up on some biscuits, then go and win some races?
185.1104: There's a whole bunch of RP ready to go! I'm gonna challenge the toughest contenders and show them how an ace runs!
185.1105: RP gauge at maximum. Let us Revel in the Rendezvous on the track.
185.1106: Looks like the RP gauge is back to full. I'll do my best to do my best.

119.2: Unity Cup: Shine On, Team Spirit!

120.1:
The petite and eccentric Director Akikawa has declared the establishment of a new tournament, the <color=#FF6D26>URA Finale</color>!
Trainers and trainees will have to work as one if they want to be crowned the inaugural URA champions!
120.2:
Team spirit! Youth! The newly revived <color=#FF6D26>Unity Cup</color> calls!
But there's not much time for fun—the academy is in danger!
If Tracen is to remain a free school,
brave spirits must band together and seize victory!
120.3: Why do Umamusume sing for their fans? An event planner suggests rekindling the <color=#FF6D26>Grand Concert</color>—inspiring the runners to find just what performances mean to them!
120.4: The media has established a new contest to determine the best runner of them all: the <color=#FF6D26>Twinkle Star Climax</color>. Follow your dreams—you never know what track they'll take you down!
120.5: The Three Goddesses descend to offer their support—in AI form! Absorb their wisdom to propel your trainee to the pinnacle of the racing world, where the ultimate challenge awaits: the <color=#FF6D26>Grandmasters</color>.

88.10001: My name's Special Week! My dream is to be the top Umamusume in all of Japan! I gotta work hard to make my moms proud!
88.10002: I'm Silence Suzuka. I love to run, and I won't give up my lead to anyone. Uh... that's about it.
88.10003: Hey hey! It's Tokai Teio! You might wanna keep an eye on me! Because there's gonna be a new undefeated Triple Crown champion in town!
88.10004: Hiii! Maruzensky here! You came here to see me, right? My running's out of this world! Hehe! Try not to fall in love too hard, okay? ♪
88.10005: I'm Oguri Cap. I'll do my best to win for the folks back home. Thanks for your support.
88.10006: Bow down! Gold Ship has arrived! Whether I gotta go through a raging inferno, the most downtrodden turf, or even way out there in outer space, I'm always up for adventure! ☆
88.10007: Yo! Vodka here! Listen up. My policy is to be the coolest at all times! I don't act all lame. Got that?
88.10008: Howdy! Taiki Shuttle here! I'm aimin' to put smiles on some faces with some hard runnin'!
88.10009: My name is Grass Wonder. I was born an Umamusume, so I will take this path as far as I possibly can. Hee hee. ♪
88.10010: I am Mejiro McQueen. I shall surely fulfill my family's ambition to claim the Tenno Sho crown.
88.10011: A mighty crimson bird swoops onto the track! It's the one, the only! El Condor Pasaaa, the strongest Umamusume in the wooorld!
88.10012: Muahahaha! Feast your eyes upon your beautiful and powerful Overlord, T.M. Opera O! My legend... begins now!
88.10013: I am Symboli Rudolf. I hold the honor of being the "Emperor" who seeks to help all Umamusume reach their true potential. Together, let us forge a path to honor and glory!
88.10014: Hello. I'm Seiun Sky. I'm just taking things as they come. Good things come to those who wait, you know?
88.10015: I'm Rice Shower... To be honest, all I ever do is cause bad things to happen, and... I'm really just no good... B-but I'm trying to be better!
88.10016: Hey, hey! My dream's always been to become a Derby Champion! OH, RIGHT! MY NAME! I'm Winning Ticket! Keep your eyes on me!
88.10017: The name's Gold City. You better not think I'm just another pretty face. I'll let my running do my talking for me.
88.10018: Hello! I'm Sakura Bakushin O! As you can tell, I'm the model class representative AND Umamusume! BAKUSHIIIN!
88.10019: Hehe. ♪ I'm Super Creek. I'll work hard to make everyone around me smile. Just leave it to me. ♪
88.10020:
I'm Haru Urara! I like carrots! Oh, and running
too! ♪ I'm always working my hardest to take first place!
88.10021: Hello. I'm Tazuna Hayakawa, the Tracen Academy director's secretary. I'm here to ensure that everyone has the best on-campus experience possible. ♪
88.10022: Hello. I'm Aoi Kiryuin, a new trainer here at Tracen Academy. I'm still learning as I go, but I'll do my absolute best!
88.10023: Hello! Daiwa Scarlet here! I'll try my best to... What am I saying? "Trying" won't cut it. I will be number one!
88.10024:
I see a buncha Umamusume here looking like they wanna take me on!
Well, Hishiama will give you all you can handle!
Come at me! One-on-one!
88.10025: I am Air Groove. If you are unwavering in your beliefs, your ideals will blossom. It is my role as Empress to lead by example.
88.10026: Hi hi! I'm Digitan! I'm here to support all these sparkling Umamusume! Every day here is a good day! Especially for an Uma Otaku!
88.10027: I'm Tamamo Cross! I'm gonna race my butt off and make a name for myself! I may not look like much, but ya don't wanna mess with me!
88.10028:
Pleased to meet you. I'm Fine Motion.
I look forward to making lots of memories here.
Would you happen to know of a good local ramen spot?
88.10029: I'm Biwa Hayahide. My goal is to devise the perfect winning equation... I'd also like to point out that my head is of completely average size!
88.10030: I'm Maya, heh heh! ☆ I love all things exciting! The thrill of adrenaline's the best! ♪ Nice to meet ya!
88.10031: I'm Manhattan Cafe. I have... a friend I want to catch up with... She's always running ahead of me... You see, right there...
88.10032: My name is Mihono Bourbon. My objective is to win the Triple Crown. Please refer to my specs for information regarding my capabilities.

The satisfying sounds of tapping reverberate around the poolside.
Standing in front of a whiteboard and instructing the two Umamusume is Ikuno Dictus.

"Do you get it now, Turbo? It is beyond reckless to get into the pool without first doing some warm-up stretches.
No matter how physically gifted you may be, if you are not careful, any misstep could prove fatal.
Do I make myself clear? First, do some stretches, and after that—"

"Okay, okay! I get it already!"

"Don't just stand there, Tannhauser, get to stretching!
For your flexing and forward bends, make sure you stay aware of your muscles and follow the directions I've written here.
If you follow this, you should be able to achieve even better results than usua—"

"G-got it!"

Matikanetannhauser, who was previously just watching the exchange, is roped into Ikuno Dictus's lecture.

"You must make sure to take good care of your legs.
Absolutely do not do anything to injure them."

"Leave me alone already..." Twin Turbo almost mutters, but instead obediently follows the advice.
Ikuno Dictus's intentions aren't to lecture all day,
but to look out for her friends. Which is why when she says,

"On that note, start again from the beginning,"

she's just trying to hammer home the importance of warming up.

"What?!"

This time she's met with protests that echo around the whole pool area. But her stretching class continues on and on all the same.
88.20026:
"Hey! S-stop. I said not to touch my ears or tail!"

"Ahaha, look, it's Nature's extended family! How fun!"

Well, they may be having fun, but not me. Hey, instead of just staring, how about you help me? Don't get me wrong—I like kids. They're cute and oh so innocent. They're completely harmless.
Except...

"Your ears are sooo cute! And so is your tail!"

"Yeah! Suuuuper cute!"

"Ugh..."
Is being completely harmless harmful in itself?
It's not like I care if a child calls me cute or not... I just can't say no when they start looking at me with those hopeful eyes and ask, "Can I pet them?"

"Don't look at me like that. I already told you no..."

But there's no anger in my words.
All right, I get it.
Pushback is futile.
By the end of it, I'll be persuaded by their sweet smiles and... ah, well.
88.20027:
I wonder if Sky is happy with the garland I made. There were many flowers to pick from, but I heard that daisies love the sun...

They wait for the sun to bloom, always facing the sunlight, just like Sky.

That's not the only thing daisies have in common with Sky.

In the language of flowers, daisies mean "simplicity" and "being yourself."

And just like how daisies flutter in the wind, peaceful and free, Sky always seems so at ease, taking naps and going fishing.

Every time we talk, I feel so relaxed. I don't feel like I have to say anything I don't want to.

(I hope she likes the daisies, because I've started to love them.)
88.20028:
I never thought you'd want to read a book like "Ivanhoe." No, believe me, I'm overjoyed.

Wait just a moment. Yes, we have it here in the library...

How about this new paperback edition? It's annotated very well, so you'll have no problem understanding the passages.

I can also recommend this large format version. It has plenty of illustrations, so you can easily picture what life was like in those days.

Oh, there's also a novelization of the movie available as well! It's an original take on the story with a truly thrilling plotline! The spear fight scene between the five Umamusume is just an absolute masterpiece.

However, I really hope you read the original story eventually! The old-fashioned and dignified style of the original text creates an impactful impression of the hero archetype.
(*The rest has been omitted.)

The people of Edo passed their fighting spirit down the generations... to youths like the fiery Umamusume here. "I'm Inari One, an Edo Umamusume, born n' raised!
