88.20033: "Today, I'd like to introduce this item—a high-pressure spray nozzle! It pumps out water like nobody's business, getting rid of tough stains while saving you time and energy! Shoes, cars, walls—spray and clean to your heart's content, because this nozzle'll do it all!" "Wow, sounds pretty handy. But I'll bet it's a pretty penny, right?" "You've got it all wrong, Sei! Our prices are mucho reasonable! And that's not all! This nozzle'll give you serious distance! Look, see that flowerbed all the way over there? I can water it just like this..." Splash! "...Uh-oh." "...Hehe. El, is this some sort of game?" "Grass?! I-it's not what it looks like! I was trying to water those flowers, and you just happened to be right next to them! Hey, back me up, Sei—wait, where'd she go?!" "Now El, would you like to explain? ...Gosh. Were you washing your training shoes?" "Th-that's exactly right! These buddies really put in the work today, so I thought I'd give 'em a little treat!" "The respect you show your equipment is certainly admirable. Do you mind washing my shoes while you're at it?" "N-not at all! ...Whew." "By the way, the next time we race, I plan to pay you back tenfold for splashing me." "Bring it! I won't lose, Grass!"
88.20034:
A runner gently dabs the sweat from her forehead. Her dignified profile reflects a noble spirit and willpower not deterred by adverse winds.

"Nevertheless, I will run."

Her legs are as delicate as a pane of glass. There are many who worry over the intensity of her running.

"Nevertheless, I will persist."

Her gaze remains fixed upon two silhouettes in the distance. One shines gloriously on the battlefield. The other carries a pale and fleeting desire. As she watches the distant two, a sense of impatience rises.

"Nevertheless, I will compete. I want to run with the pride I now feel in my heart."

And so, she steps forward and will continue to do so for so long as she breathes... no, so long as the path still stretches before her.
88.20035: Ugh, can we pleeease take a break already? There's like no way I can keep on. Also, FYI, you're not supposed to go all out during partner runs. Quit passing me up on the ramp. She sure made passing me look easy though... It's like a joke. Props to her... Oh crap, my nails aren't dry yet. Blow... Blow... I keep losing. This sucks. Oh, they're dry now! ☆ All right, time to hit that ramp!
88.20037: Golden broth bathing a neat swirl of glossy noodles... Pork boiled to melt-away softness... The hungrier I get, the more my mind lingers upon ramen. From exquisite gourmet masterworks to the homely bowls of a mom-and-pop place, to the cup noodles you can make yourself! Ah, what wonders await me in ramen's myriad representations! Oh, I've just had a thought—what if I knight the lovely chefs who spread ramen to the populace? Why, we could supply top-of-the-line facilities for the Knights of Ramen to further refine their most noble craft... Imagine, we could forge a new holy ramen empi—huh? What do you mean? Why would that make it harder for them to cook?
88.20038:
She sits confidently, surrounded by her squealing fangirls. It's hard to say whether the cynical smirk on her lips masks ire at the fuss—or a smug satisfaction.

There's something about her that stops you from trying to get closer, but you can't look away.

Is there no one here who can withstand the charismatic draw she has? All who pass are stopped dead in their tracks, gawking.

The growing crowd jostles and blocks my view. I go up on tip-toe, craning my neck for a glimpse, and then...

"What's this? You're looking awfully desperate. Did you hope I'd flash you a smile too?"
88.20039: I know you said you were just "keeping an eye out" to make sure I don't ditch my classroom cleanup duties, but c'mon... Would it reeeally be such a "disrespect to the other students" if I took a tiny break? Do you reeeeeeeally gotta yell at me for taking one minute to check a notif? ...Huh? Wait, why've you got a broom? ...What do you mean, "let's get this over with"? Since when are you my mom? I'll do it myself in a minute. And besides, I thought you had plans today. Those creams puff you were gushing about all week are gonna sell out again if you don't get moving. ...Huh? But you were going on and on about how excited you were... Ugh, fine.Just you watch—I'll get this classroom spotless in seconds! But if they're sold out when we get there, it's your fault!
88.20040:
Whew, I worked up a good sweat! I'm really feeling it in my hamstrings!

After finishing her training routine, Ryan gulps down a big sip of her drink.

"Come sit in the shade with me. This kind of heat wears down your body, even if you're not running around. It's about time you rehydrated, if you want a sip of my—"

She hurriedly retracts the hand she started offering, fumbling her bottle.

"B-But of course, you wouldn't want something I already put my mouth on. Haha... silly me! I'll, uh, I'll just zip over to the locker room and get you a new one!"

I catch a glimpse of her face going red, and then she turns and takes off at full speed.
88.20041:
"Wow..."

She sits alone in an empty classroom, reviewing race footage. Enraptured by the blindingly confident strides on screen, she unconsciously gives voice to her thoughts.

"Even if this is what I'm up against... I have to shine brighter."

But before she can contemplate further, her thoughts are interrupted by the door being boldly thrown open.

"Why, if it's not the lovely Admire Vega! Fancy meeting you here—nay, it must be the hand of fate... the will of destiny that draws us together!"

Upon recognizing the voice of the intruder, Admire Vega quietly closes her laptop.

"I hope I haven't kept you waiting, my dear rival! But be assured, I'll not delay our passionate duet another second!"

"...I wasn't 'waiting' for you, and we're rivals on the track, not the stage."

Even as she speaks, she slips her laptop into her bag and starts to make for the door.

"Such a difficult expression clouds your fair countenance! Let us tackle your worries together! Ahhh, I can see it play out in my mind's eye—and what a tender, heartwarming scene it is!"

"..."

Despite her rival's supplication, Admire Vega holds her tongue. For if T.M. Opera O were to know whose race she'd been watching... her peace and quiet would be as good as gone.
88.20042: Good morning, students! I trust you all had a good breakfast! "You may not have noticed, but there's a secret meaning to your morning meals. Sound it out, now..." "Breakfast... Break... fast. Did you catch that?! Breakfast. FAST!" "That's right, each 'breakfast' you eat has a bit of 'fast' in it! And if you multiply your 'fast' intake over a week or month... That's a lot of speed!" "Revolutionary, I know. But if you don't eat well each morning, that's a lot of latent bakushin potential you'd be missing out on. So remember: BREAKFAST, RUN FAST!"
88.20043: I wonder how many letters I've sent home to Hokkaido since I came to Tracen. I know I could just call Mom, but for some reason... When I write my feelings out on paper, I think I understand them better. Why I felt happy about something, or what the root of my worries was. And I'll bet it's just the same for Mom. At least, I sure hope my feelings are coming though my letters... "Dear Mom, How's everything been?"
88.20044: So you come here pretty often, I take it? Curren: Yup! When I first moved into the dorms, I got all sorts of cute stuff for my room here, and I've been coming back ever since! ♪ I see, so this store means a lot to you! Curren: The inside looks the same as it did the first time I walked in, so it makes me all nostalgic. ...Oh! This mug! They've been selling these mugs with this design foreeever! ♪ The colors on mine are all faded now, but that kinda makes me happy too, you know? In what way? Curren: This mug's shown its stuff in my strategy meetings with Trainer! Whenever we fall into a slump and don't know what to do, it's this mug that saves us! During our breaks, it always brings us the fresh new strategy we need! That's why... when I look at my faded mug, I can't help but think of all the hurdles we've overcome, and all of the effort we've put in. You could say that your mug's color is proof of your hard work. Curren: Exactly! I wanna keep on using this mug and make it an even cuter color! ♪ Profile: Curren Chan An Umamusume at Tracen Academy. She's an influencer popular with the younger demographic. Her moniker of Cute Curren Chan often makes it into the top trends. Recently, she's gotten really into training. Umastagram: @Curren
88.20045: Mmph! Nnngh! C-can pigeons... really make... this pose?! Uuurgh, o-owie... I-I can't hold this any... longer—but I can't stop now! I'm aiming to be a dazzling star! I'm going say to my fans and my biggest supporter, "Thank you! Let's keep on walking the path of the Umadol together!" After all, I'm a top Umadol, so of course... I can... do this! Crack. ...Ouch.
88.20046: A strong breeze sweeps the hat off the girl's head and onto the turf. Picking it up, the girl looks closely at the hat and recalls the magic her grandmother taught her... "Hm, and what do we have here? Why is my cute Sweepy crying?" "Your hat got dirty? Hoho... There's no need to cry, my cute Sweepy. ...Why, you ask? Well, that's because you're one step closer to becoming a full-grown witch!" "As you know, a witch is never without her hat. And as a hat gets dirtied and frayed from traveling alongside its witch, it becomes imbued with magic." "Now, come a bit closer. Let me teach you a spell to clean the blemishes without washing away the newfound magic." "...It's time to use the cleaning spell you taught me, Grandma! But first, I'll need to gather all the necessary magical tools! If I remember right, I need distilled water, soap, and..."
88.20047:
The usual arcade is filled with excitement, not unlike that of a concert.

"Hehe, I'm on my way to a new high score! Everyone, let me hear you scream!"

In front of a large machine dances a single girl. Her cheerful voice rings throughout the room, and her tail sways in rhythm with her nimble dance steps. I find myself lost in her bright smile—

"Hey! Cheer me on too, okay?"

I feel my heart jump out of my chest. In the next instant, I realize that both her wink and words just now were directed at me.

"And to finish it off, a turn... and a V for victory! Yay, a new high score!"

The machine displays an unbelievably impressive score, and the crowd goes wild. I clap along as well.

"Thanks for cheering me on, everyone! ...Whoa, it's already this late? Let's all meet at the racetrack next time, okay? The mighty Teio will give you a show you won't forget! And with that, I'll take my leave!"

True to her word, the girl abruptly runs out the door. Yet even long after she's gone, the image of her smile is still etched into my mind.

That was probably the moment I became a fan of this little emperor—Tokai Teio.
88.20048:
"Um... are you planning to eat all of that?"

In response to the cameraman's question, Oguri Cap nods with a straight face. However, the fact that her tail is swaying back and forth doesn't escape the eyes of the reporter. At Oguri's level of competition, she must have to train long hours every day, so the reporter asks if this is her way of recharging herself after a long day's work.

Oguri Cap: "No, I just want to eat, that's all. I love eating. Food, eating, and filling up my stomach... I love it all."

Still staring at the food, Oguri Cap's pupils light up like comets glittering in the night sky.

Oguri: "Mind if I begin? Oh, and feel free to try some too. Well then... don't mind if I do!"

With a smile like a flower in full bloom, she digs into the food, and with that, the cameraman is able to catch a rare glimpse of the cool racer's private life.

(Excerpt from Twinkle Monthly, Cover Feature! Oguri Cap—a Peek into the Life of a Racing Idol.)
88.20049:
...I don't want to be known as just some dress-up doll. I want to prove that I can work on something besides my looks.

"Yikes, I burned it again."

There's still so much more I can learn. Like, how to take care of myself, for starters. One day, I won't be just another pretty sight—I'll be the whole package.

"...Right, let's try that again!"
88.20050: "Phew... Oh hey. It's one of Hishiama's rice balls.I bet she's using some of that primo salmon." "You know..." "Oh hey, don't worry! This stuff was made just for us. There's even some for you, King." "Th-that's not what I'm worried about! Weren't you supposed to be doing early training today?! You haven't even changed yet, and why are you drinking water straight from the bottle like a slob?!" "My, someone's chipper today. But yeah, I think I'm feeling pretty good and awake now. I'm off to change. Laters! ...Actually, before I bounce—those rice balls were set out for us. It'd be a shame if they sat there too long and went bad. Now, see ya for realsies." "...It would be a shame to see them thrown away. Munch. Delicious! Now that I think about it... Racing is all that's been on my mind lately. I haven't made much time to enjoy so much as a leisurely meal, let alone anything else..." "Oh, King, one more thing! Those pickles in the blue containers? They're from my family. Feel free to dig in!" "Hmmngh? Oh for... Got it, so PLEASE just go get changed!"
88.20051:
She had this to say about her two record-breaking accomplishments: "I am able to run thanks to everyone's support. I'm elated if these results can repay the favor in some, small way."

Feeling as if the people around brought unto her a miracle, the runner hopes that she was able to manifest one herself. She broke away and kept pace in front of the pack with only a shadow trailing her.

At that moment, the gratitude and persistence she held in her heart shone in her blue eyes like fire. And through the embers... she grabbed hold of the 3rd Miracle.

(Photo: Editorial - Etsuko Otonashi)
88.20052: "Hmm... Plenty to look back on this month it seems. I didn't collapse during training even once, and I got to go watch Spe and the others' debut race... Y-yeah. This month should make for some great motivation. Oof okay, enough reminiscing! Gotta start planning this next month's training and uh... Maybe I should actually start with diet planning? O-oh yeah, and I need to buy some more hot patches... Wait, huh? What's with this steamy steamy tea? When did I put that there?" "Tee hee, I'd be delighted if it's to your taste." "Bright? Good morning! Sorry, I didn't even notice you had set it there! Better drink it before it gets cold... Ack, hot!" "Now, that won't do my dear Tsuru. You should blow on it first like such. Phew, phew! Try it together with me... Phew, phew!" "Uh, okay! Pheeew, pheeew... Gulp. Ahhh!" "Hehe, please do try the sweets as well. Now then, please excuse me. I'm going to go wash up." "Oh, okay! Thank you very much! Munch... Oh hehe, these are so sweet! All right, back to business, back to business. What was I deliberating over again? Okay... First I need to look at the big picture, then I just need to prioritize everything. Heh, wow though. I can't believe how much I was stressing over this before! Here goes nothin'!"
88.20053:
"Top Road, you dropped some documents. We're going to use these for our next world history lesson, right? I'll help you out, so give me half."

"Wow, thank you so much! But it's fine! They're not heavy. This is just part of the class president's job!
But more importantly, Ayabe! Are you ready for the next lesson? Since we're going on a field trip, it'd be a good idea to get packed early!"

"Geez, worry about yourself for once! Here, just give me some."

"Ayabe...!"

"That's right, Top Road! Let Taishin and me carry some too!"

"Ugh, don't shout in my ear! They're not going to let up, so just let us take some, Top Road."

"Ticket, Taishin! Well if you insist, can the both of you take the poster paper? And the globe if you would, Ayabe?"

Narita Top Road quickly and efficiently allocates the classroom materials but keeps a firm grip on the heavy box full of documents.
88.20054:
"Ah, the very sun itself blushes in my presence! Ha! That stands to reason, as I am the cosmos' most beautiful existence!
Doto! Let us start this photoshoot! The people must know and admire the one who shall become the Centurial Overlord!"

"R-right!"

T.M. Opera O, having just made her debut, has chosen Meisho Doto to take her publicity photos.

"I'm aiming for that Centurial Overlord feel! What say you of this majestic cape? Surely you are overtaken by sheer awe!"

"Y-you're shining even brighter than ever! I knew that the Solefall Faire wouldn't be the last time I saw you wearing it!
I'll, uh... I'll go ahead and start, okay? Um, what angle should we go for... How about th—ahhh! Oh nooo!"

Meisho Doto trips, and the camera flies into the air. In her panic, she dives to try and catch it.

"Ahhh, I'm s-sooo sorry! I almost ruined such an expensive camera! Somehow I managed to save it, but...Huuuh? The camera was in b-b-burst mode? There are sooo many photos!"

"Oho? Well done, Doto! You have captured me at my best! Just look at this dashing pose! Since the creation of heaven and earth, ne'er before has such a treasure has been spun!
My heartfelt praise goes out to you, Doto! You've captured me at my most radiant. 'Tis expected of my sworn rival! Haaah ha ha ha!"

"O-Opera O! Th-that's a lot to unpack, but I'm happy to hear that!"
88.20055:
My smartphone buzzes with a notification. There's a new message on LANE.
"Aston Machan sent a file."

Taking a glance, it appears to be a sound file—no context. Maybe she's still typing out a message?
Nothing comes through, even after waiting, so I tap the Play button.

"Battery level okay. The microphone is also working. Yay!
Well then, allow me to begin. It's time for Aston Machan Radio! Heh, Heh, maybe that's too silly...
Now then, let's do this safely, and gaze at the sky from the rooftop. I'll even let my legs dangle over. See? This isn't scary at all.
There are lots of puddles from the heavy rain yesterday. Thanks to that, Machan is between the skies. The big sky above and the little sky below.
Right now, I am among the very skies themselves."

I pause the clip and stand from my chair. I can picture it in my head—a place within the academy where one can gaze upon the lovely sky.
If I dash up the staircase with all my might, then just how will she greet me? Perhaps with a troubled smile?

"You found me. Machan was here all along."
88.20056:
I like flashy titles—being called "the strongest" and obtaining glory and all that. I mean who doesn't, right?
But she's different. She shines more than anyone else. It's practically blindin'.
Heh, well bring it on. I don't care how bright that light is. I'll face it head on and rip it apart.
Can't win otherwise, y'know? I'm aimin' to be the brightest and flashiest alive.

"Hey, Tachyon. You're comin' with me."
88.20057:
Yeah, this new dryer works great. My hair doesn't feel too frizzy. In fact, it feels pretty soft. Leave it to Air Groove to know the best products. I'd like to thank her somehow... Maybe I can gift her a potpourri?
If I keep up this routine, could I one day pull off a wavy style like Bright's? I've always thought it was adorable. Pleasant to the touch, like cotton candy... Maybe Ryan would run her fingers through my hair as well.
N-not that I'd WANT that, of course! That'd be way too embarrassing.

"Meh, it's never going to happen. Our hair is just way too different."

"Hiya, Dober! That dryer new?"

"Whoa, Taiki? Um, yeah. Air Groove was the one who recommended it to me."

"Oh, that's great! Air Groove's hair is straight and silky smooth, just like yours. It's a match made in heaven!"

"Once you're done drying, you better let me feel it myself! ♪ Oh, I can't wait!"

"Huh, why though? I mean, I guess that would be fine..."

She waited with a huge smile on her face until I said that I was ready. She jumped right behind me and immediately got to work.
I expected a tug to match her boundless energy, but the way that she combed through my hair from root to tip was much gentler than I had expected.
It admittedly took me a while until I finally asked her to stop out of embarrassment.
88.20058: "Ah... Achoo! " "My apologies—I've had the sniffles since yesterday. I usually try not to sneeze so openly in public, but..." "I think I'll open a window. Perhaps the dustiness is partly to blame." Symboli Rudolf opens the window, allowing a warm breeze to chase out the dry air. She takes a deep breath, then slowly exhales. "As I was saying, I usually restrain my sneezing around company, but... Hehe. It seems you have me beat. Honestly, I should be more mindful around those close to me, not less." As she turns away to gaze outside, a beam of orange sunlight dyes a blush upon her cheeks.
88.20059:
Even at the beginning of our time at this academy, Agnes Tachyon was already the center of attention. We happened to be in the same class, so I remember clearly how everyone watched her every movement—to the point that it was rude, honestly.

At first, it was because of her lineage, of course. Tracen has a lot of talented heiresses from racing families, but her grandmother was an Oaks winner, and her mother was an undefeated Oka Sho winner, so I could understand the extra curiosity.

But the attention on her quickly became due to other reasons. Her behavior was eccentric and her experiments suspicious, yet despite it all, her talent was undeniable. Anyway, my point is, you can understand why people would want to avoid her.

"Mwahaha! What a delightful thesis idea I've stumbled upon. I'll be breaking new ground on Umamusume muscle contractions and energy dynamics—why, I may even make this the topic of my next experiment! Heh, just kidding!"

She's at it again today, sitting in the corner of the busy cafeteria, surrounded by empty chairs. Perhaps there's an invisible barrier around her? Given the bizarre amount of sugar cubes she's stacked up, maybe she's performing a ritual to keep others away. Ordinary students like me couldn't hope to cross a barrier like that.

"Tachyon. You shouldn't play with your food."

"Oh, if it isn't Cafe! Well, that saying only applies if I am not utilizing food for its intended purpose, does it not? You see, I plan to put all of this sugar—yes, all of it—into my tea! Thus, since I will be consuming it, there is no—"

"Problem? I'm not convinced."

Apparently, there are many students who can cross that barrier these days.

Cafe passes by the empty chairs and sits across from Tachyon, sighing. As she does, a single sugar cube topples and falls off one of the unsteady towers.
88.20060:
"One, two, three, four! Five, six, seven, eight!"

"A deep breath to finish... and that's it for the warm-up!"

"All right, time to swim! And once we're nice and hungry, I've got a basket of buono donuts I baked to fill us up!"

"Huh? You're not a good swimmer? In that case, how about you hold onto my hands and I'll teach you how!"

"Come on, we've got donuts as round as swimming rings waiting for us—so let's do our best together!"

"Okay, now let's dive in with a spla..."

"Wait, stop! That's not a swimming ring! That's the special mega donut I baked!"
88.20061:
~The Origin of Golshi Yakisoba~

It all began when I was still legally brunette, before I ever dumped rice flour on my head...

"Please, won't somebody buy my sauce? Please, the recipe's been passed down my family for generations. Ahh, poor me. No one will buy my sauce..."

Defeated and on the verge of resignation, I began making a sand castle on the beach.

Suddenly, the Umamusume bodhisattva Guanyin broke the water, with hair like fine pearls and beauty so radiant she literally glowed. She opened her mouth and said to me—

"O Golshi, the answer you seek is yakisoba. You must make yakisoba with that sauce. Do so, and the sauce—as well as your name—will be famous throughout the world. Also, why don't you try racing or something?"

And that's how Golshi's hip-hop happenin' yummy yakisoba was born. The end, everyone lived happily ever after.

So yeah, that's the legend this hanging scroll's depicting. Huh? You think Umamusume Guanyin's the spitting image of me? Yeah, yeah, you gotta work on some less cliche pickup lines, my friend. ☆
88.20062:
Blue skies as far as the eye can see! How could you not go for a drive on a day as radical as this?

Come on, hop in shotgun. Tata says she'll take us somewhere you'll totally dig.

She's always taking me to the most happening places around—perfect for getting my spirits up!

Oh, and don't forget your seatbelt, s'il vous plait. ♪

There's no better feeling than the wind on my face when I'm one with Tata, racing toward the horizon!

And if you're tired from work, there's nothing better for taking a load off than putting pedal to the metal!
88.20063: Pitter, patter... Rain... And just when I was hoping to keep running a little longer. I wonder when it'll let up. This reminds me of the time Spe and I got caught in a rainstorm during a training run. We stood beneath a tree for shelter and passed the time by telling each other what the clouds reminded us of. Though at first, I didn't know she was talking about the clouds. She just started listing off foods like steamed buns and rice balls. Carrot cake, hamburger steak... She really does love to eat. That cloud looks like a pair of running shoes. And that one, like a cleat. As for that one... A winner's sash. Oh. The rain clouds are dispersing. Thank goodness. It was just a passing shower. Hmm? That cloud looks like a carrot hamburger steak... Hehe, I wonder if Spe can see it too.
88.20064:
Yay! ♪ The weather's perfect! ♪ The air is brimming with yang qi, so it's gonna be a great day for sure. But I wonder what kind!

Of course, the most important thing to start the day off with is color! If I want to have a good day, I have to manage my own luck!

Now, which handkerchief should I go with today? Maybe green for growth, so that I can do my best during training?

No, it has to be the lemon yellow of serenity, so that all that effort doesn't tire me out...

Oh, but none of that will mean anything if I get hurt during training. Should I go with purple, to ward off ill fortune?

No, wait. I want to run into a compatible partner who I can train together with! So it has to be red, for encountering new beginnings!

As for the pattern, I'll go with flowers, to promote personal relationships! Yeah, perfect! ♪ This'll draw in the best qi flow there is!

"Rickey! You're still picking your handkerchief?! You're going to be late for school!"

"Remember how you only barely made it last time because you spent so long picking the color of your socks?!"

"Whoa, you're right! Look at the time! Thanks, Tarumae!" Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Dashing off double-time toward an excellent day!
88.20065:
Fair blue skies, scorching rays of sun.
The comfort of the passing breeze,
and the warmth of the tea I drink.
If only I could etch them all into my memory without flaw.

Yet, I know I will forget one day.
The memories will fade,
chased away by those more vivid,
until no longer clear in my mind's eye.
But if I hold on to one,
may it be of this smile of hers.

Amid the days passing by,
this is no more than a fleeting, everyday moment.
Yet here we sat side by side,
this nostalgia its own proof.
For if I can but remember her smile,
even if all else were to be lost to time,
I will know that there will come a day
when I may enjoy the taste of this tea once more.
88.30001:
"H-h-hey everybody. Th-thanks for coming out to s-shee us!"

Charmed by the nervous Umamusume's earnest attempt at a greeting, laughter breaks out among the crowd.

"Th-there are so many people!"

"Spe, calm down."

"Yeah, we'll be fine! Just do what we did in practice."

Perhaps calmed by their words, she takes a deep breath and looks out.

"A-as thanks for all your support, I'm going to give today's concert my best!"

Her words are met with cheers. With a smile across her face, she begins the winning concert.
88.30002:
"I was actually... kind of scared. I didn't know what I was supposed to convey to you all."

The venue is completely silent. They sit enraptured, hanging onto every word of the girl standing at center stage.

"I just... love to run. Nothing else interests me."

She hesitates, formulating her next statement.

"But right now, I just want to sing you a song. If I can get through this hurdle, I think I can understand why my heart is pounding so much..."

The song starts to play. She takes a deep breath and reaches out her hand. The answer she seeks is just around the corner.
88.30003:
"Hi, hi! I know we're in the middle of a song, but let's all show some love to the wonderful me! ♪"

Tokai Teio stands at the edge of the stage working up the crowd. She takes a few light steps back to the center and begins the rehearsed choreography.

"I placed first today, meaning center stage is for me! I'm the best and I always will be! ♪"

With the spotlight making her shine all the more, she raises three fingers to the sky.

"My goal to become the undefeated Triple Crown champion is not just a dream! So get rid of those nasty doubts and root for me all the way! ♪"
88.30004: The Golshi battleship has no need for fuel. When fancy strikes her, she takes off like the wind, but she is a fickle being. Go LD-Ship I (A poet, a philosopher, and fearless adventurer/????) "Get out of my way! Move, I say! Move!" All of a sudden, in the final stretch, that devilish silver-haired racer we all thought was in dead last charges forward! "Yahoo! Bada-bing-bada-boom!" Shocking and fearless, she blasts past the finish line and winds up in the North Pole. "Whoops! I missed the K-point! Oh, I'm such a klutz! ☆" Tune in next time for Oden! You'd better be watching!
88.30005: Speaking of which, where is that Umamusume? In that precise moment, she kicks into high gear and faces the last stretch to break the dead heat. "All right! The real race starts here!" Vodka blasts forward from the rear and easily glides past each of the racers. "Hehe! I am the best!" She presses on. Her engine warms as she continues accelerating to full throttle. And then... "Watch and learn, punks! This is what Vodka can do! And don't you dare forget!" Her engines rev and rev and rev until she finishes first. Legends are those who live up to their coolness.
88.30006: "Flowers are like the hearts of plants." Grass Wonder smiles softly as she lightly plucks a flower from its stem. "That's what some people say. Each season stands out because of its most beautiful flowers. And with such beauty, they show us their hearts." Suddenly, her eyes, softened by her smile, begin to narrow. She sticks the last flower in place. "Now, how does that look? I hope my heart will be to your liking." The heart of a gentle girl who hides a mighty fighting spirit stands tall and dignified. A heart that is both delicate and bold.
88.30007:
EL! EL! ELLL!

A lone shadow sways on stage as it is greeted by the aggressive calls of the crowd.

"And in the red corner of the ring! Coming to you all the way from the US of A!
Standing at 163 centimeters and weighing in at none of your business... The masked menace of the ring.
The myth. The legend..."

She flips up her coat and raises a fist into the air!

"The Phantom Bird! ELLLL CONDOOOOR PAAASAAA!"

"YEAAAAAH!"

"You, in the blue corner, ARE YOU READY? Ready to dance?!
Let's give 'em a show to remember!"
88.30008:
By the time her opponents realize this was all part of her plan, it's too late.

"Nyahahaha! I've taken first! ♪"

Just as her opponent rushes forward, Seiun Sky, too, kicks into top speed. The front runner enters the final stretch.

"My run-to-the-front-then-chill strategy worked like
a charm! ♪ Now I can just cruise along."

"I'm going to catch you, Sei!"

"...or not. Ack!"

(Well, I wasn't really intending to make this easy. I'm trying to win too, after all!)

"Catch me if you can! But catching me is like catching
a cloud. ♪"
88.30009:
"Aw yeah, I'm feelin' a win comin' on!
Hey, hey, hey, hey! Whaddya lookin' at?!"

The little Umamusume Tamamo Cross hops about in the paddock, but no matter how much she leaps and shouts, she barely stands out.

"Look over here, ya jerks! Don't underestimate me just 'cause I'm small!"

She jumps with everything she's got, straight towards the sky. Finally, just when people start to notice her...

"That's right! Brace yourselves! My runnin's gonna make ya weep for your mommies!"

The audience can't help but smile at her charming antics. In just a few moments, she'll become a strike of lightning.
88.30010:
"Wow. It's so beautiful."

The whole audience sways to the beat of the song. Even the gentle wave of Fine Motion's hand seems to naturally exude elegance.

(After all the excitement of a race, there's still more excitement waiting.)

She experiences a feeling she never dreamed of before, as if she were looking out at something beautiful from her windowsill.

(I want to make more memories with everyone here at Tracen Academy.)

"Racing, dancing, and laughing! I want to do it all! ♪"

You can't find lucky clovers if you don't pursue them!
88.30011: Even as she stands inside the breezy gate, Ines Fujin can't help but think of her family. "Father. Mother. Sisters. Watch me. I'm going to make you all proud!" She bounds out of the starting gate with great power. But perhaps as a result, she sways slightly to the right. (Whoops! But I'm fine!) She kicks back hard and quickly straightens herself. Within moments, her mistake, family, and competitors all disappear from her mind. "Huff... huff... Hahaha!" A gentle breeze? No. A raging storm rushes over the track.
88.30012: With 200 meters left to go, just past the starting line, the best friends reunite. Winning Ticket, ahead of the pack, can feel the heat of the chase without even looking back. "Huff... Huff... Dang it!" "Raaah... Tiiiicket!" (This is so fun! Super-duper fun! Running with Taishin and Hayahide is amazing! I want to run more!) To shake off her best friends, she musters all her strength and lets out a deafening scream. "URRRAAAHHH!" (I won't lose. I won't lose. I CAN'T LOSE! They're my friends—my best friends, so I can't...) "I won't hold back!"
88.30013:
(Not an inch out of line... Time to GO!)

Air Shakur lunges forward in a primal rage. Everyone in the stands sighs, "Again?"
There she goes wasting all her energy on that stupid run of hers. There's no way she can keep it up.

(Or at least, that's what they think...)

However, she doesn't falter and instead accelerates, turning their sighs into visible confusion.

(I knew this would happen. I've calculated just how much stamina I need at this point in the race!)

Her repeated simulations have led her to discover the perfect equation.

"Take this as proof, you idiots!"

The unexpected results shock and anger those around her, but Air Shakur is undeterred. She returns their scorn with mocking laughter.
88.30014: Gold City's golden strands wave in the wind as raindrops slide down her locks. Her breathtaking beauty, apparent even from a distance, is completely obscured by mud. "Just a... little... more!" If she can leave the rest of the runners behind on this last stretch, victory is hers. Yet the ragged breathing of her competition catches up to her, and the muddy track continues to splatter everywhere. (Ah, this is bad. My legs are so heavy! But I have to keep going! I'm so close to winning!) The slightest mistake could throw away her win in this fierce competition, but Gold City's smile shines bright. (Now this is what I'm talking about!) The rain, the mud, the sweat... They are merely accessories. This is the runway where she shines!
88.30015: "BEHOLD! Feast your eyes on the lunchbox of the class representative!" Her eyes beaming, even Sakura Bakushin O's lunchbox seems to exude confidence. It's practically—no, it is bursting with it. "No picnic is complete without sandwiches! They're healthy, colorful... What more could you ask for?" The bread bounces in her hand as she chatters. The cucumber dances. The ham jiggles. "All right. Time to dig in! The picnic's just getting started! Let's eat, then run. OR WHY NOT EAT WHILE I RUN?!" It's then I realize her sakura-colored eyes drawing near. "Bakushin! Let's chow down!"
88.30016:
Here! Have a piece of candy.

...Yes, that's right. I'm talking to Y-O-U. ♪
The one who's staring at me. Please take it.

Hehe, you look nervous. Are you worried about whether I can win or not?

It's true that Oguri and Inari and many other strong racers will be racing as well, but...

I know I'll win. So just sit back and watch.

All right, time to give it my all. If you behave the whooole race and wait until I get back, you'll have earned a few pats on the head. ♪
88.30017:
"Hey, everyooone! Let me hear it! What is it you like about me? ♪"

You're lovely! You're smart! You're super plucky!

"What the heck was that last one? Whatever! ☆ Next, I want you to say my name!"

She's so cute, even when she's running full speed. Oh, Falcooo!

"Now, that's what I wanna hear. ☆ All right then, last one! Say you love me and blow a kiss! ☆"

L-O-V-E!
WE LOVE FALCOOOO!

"Thank youuuu! I'll race to the top, and one day, I'll be the best Umadol!
Just you wait and see! ☆ Mwah! ♪"
88.30018:
"E-everyone...
I have something I want to talk about today!"

A young and innocent-looking girl tightly grips the microphone.

"Thank you for all your support!
I'm still new at this, but..."

The small flower begins to bloom.

"I know one day I'll grow up to be a mature and responsible racer!
So please keep watching over me!"

After the concert, many throughout the venue could be heard whispering, "I have to live long enough to see that day."
88.30019: The Ice Cream Song, by Haru Urara Oh, ice cream! Ice cream! It's so fine! An ice cream plushie?! It shall be mine! The crane goes chomp, chomp! It swings but doesn't crumble! Have all the coins we fed it made it big with sturdy muscles? The super strong, invincible, ice cream. Yay! Don't squeeze your ice cream, don't be a fool, But plushies can be cuddled 'cause they're soft and so cool! (Don't lick them though! That's the golden rule!) Every ice cream's tasty, that's understood, Strawberry or orange, melon or grape. Either way, it's all so good, good, good... "Hehe, now I really want some ice cream! Let's go get some! ♪"
88.30020:
"What's this?! The audience isn't getting excited for our concert? Looks like it's time for some justice!"

"Allow me to assist!"

"That voice! It must be..."

"Nutritious! Virtuous! It's the carotene-charged Carrot Ranger! And what’s this?!"

"With wings of justice that slice through evil, she soars through the clouds and makes the skies rumble! Biko Pegasus comes to the rescue! The tag team you've all been waiting for!"

BOOOOOM!

"We must make sure that everyone can smile! It's showtime for justice!"
88.30021:
Good work today, Trainer! My name is Tazuna Hayakawa. I'm the director's secretary here at Tracen Academy. I will do my best to support you from here on, so please do not hesitate to ask me any questions you may have. ♪

Now, without further ado, here are some school documents. Please take a look through them before you start your work.

Here at Tracen Academy, we have a full range of educational resources and facilities to support our Umamusume. Of course, we also have a wealth of knowledge and resources to support your growth as well, so don't worry!

I've been looking forward to working with you. Let's both do our best to make sure the Umamusume are looked after properly!
88.30022:
"Thank you for your support, everyone!"

Mejiro McQueen waves her hand with dignity and grace. The beads of sweat running down her forehead are the only sign of the brutal race that just concluded.

"Winning first place today was another forward step in my journey. I will continue living up to the Mejiro name with every wonderful victory I claim hereafter!"

The audience roars, overflowing with enthusiasm. She then turns away and makes her elegant exit.

(That's it. I'm going to treat myself to cake today. Oh, but what kind should I have?)

Despite her refined behavior, she's still an innocent and sweet girl inside.
88.30023:
(Come on, Rice! You can do it!)

She had thought the only one to cheer her on was herself.

RICE! RICE! RICE! RICE!

But as she dashes past the other racers, like a gift from the heavens, she hears the cheers of many, many people in the stands.

"Oh, I, uh..."

Surprise and confusion overtake her, but finally... she takes one big step forward...

"Th-thank you very much!"

The cheering continues, on and on into eternity.
88.30024:
Hm...

"Yeah. Plushie me is very adorable."

Of course. You—or I guess 'I' was born receiving lots of love, after all.

"Soon, many different people are going to come to take you away. And they will cherish and love you."

"Mama! That Oguri plushie is so cute! I wanna hold her!"

"Oh, looks like it's your time already. All right, I'm counting on you, 'me.' Get all the love and hugs in my place."

We're on it!
88.30025:
Dear Spe,

Thank you for your letter. I can't believe you got lost already! I wonder who you get your total lack of direction from... Make sure you thank Suzuka properly!

I'm glad you've already met someone so kind. Since the two of you are roommates, you won't want to make any trouble for her. So take care not to oversleep or make any messes, okay?

I suppose I can admit this now, but I always worried that you might be lonely living in a place with no other Umamusume. So hearing you've already made a friend makes me so happy!

I hope you make lots more friends and have a great time at school. I'll send your favorites, Spe. (Carrots, of course!) Share them with Suzuka as well.

Stay healthy and stay happy.

Love,

Mom
88.30026:
A girl jumps into the shot.

"Hey, guys! It's me, Turbo! Hey, hey... is this thing workin' right?
It is?! All right, as long as they can see me!
So, anyway, this upcomin' race is gonna be a special one!"

She brings her face closer to the camera. Her sparkling eyes glimmer like thousands of stars.

"I'm gonna wipe the floor with all of 'em! For sure! For sure! I mean it!
I'm gonna dash to the front and win!"

Her voice is bright and hopeful with no signs of worry. Having captured everyone's attention, she proclaims loudly,

"I'm super tough! I'm gonna charge my turbo engines and then WHOOOOSH!
I'll be in first the whole time!"

Maybe it's her naivete shining through, but her words ring reckless... yet innocent.

"I won't lose!"

Perhaps her words are not just a declaration, but a promise to herself. Or perhaps they're meant to encourage those who feel lost.

"So keep your eyes on me!"

Her words echo out forth to everyone on the other side of the screen.
88.30027:
"Ahaha! Get hyped! This could be it!"

Intermixed with the cheers and laughter are lukewarm stares, as if to say, "Them again?" It's nothing new, we're used to it by now. Still...

(Yeah. Everyone gets their chance. Even us. This might be it.)

I feel my toes tighten.
...Interesting. It's as if my whole body is telling me I can go further. What was it that you call this feeling?
That's right! This means I'm getting pumped!

"Whoa! Palmer! This is soooo crazy! You're, like, hella vibing right now!"

Oh, that's it. Yeah, that's what this feeling is. Even hearing the clamor from the audience feels great. I can win, I can keep going. I won't stop. I'm going to run as fast as I can. That's what my body's telling me.
But what if I lose steam before I get there? What if... I can't?

"YOU CAN DO IT! RUN, PALMEEEEER!"

A voice from behind instantly wipes away my fear. We're supposed to be competing, yet she still cheers me on.

(Thanks, Helios.)

Oh... The heat in my body is rising. I still have the energy. I can keep going! I can keep pushing on! Time to kick into high gear, and go, go, go! It's time to surpass my limits!

"Here it comes. Watch me run, run, run away!"
88.30028:
(I knew you'd come, Dia!)

Ahhh, it's as beautiful as I imagined.

I can hear the exhausted pants.
Her kicking footsteps are getting closer.
Those eyes, glimmering like sparkling jewels,
blind me even from behind.
I won't let up, not even for a second.

(I won't let you pass me.)

After all, the road before me is just as bright.

The memory of bitter defeat from being outran by the slightest of margins is still firmly etched in my mind.
We ran with full force and full spirit,
eyes set on the finish line.

I struggled, I felt regret...
But I also had fun.
I'm not going to lose again.
I don't want to lose.

(And yet...)

She's closing in.
Her desire to win...
It draws near, growing hotter and hotter,
until I can feel it blaze across my back.

(Are you having fun too, Dia?)

Soon, you'll be at my side.
And I bet you'll be smiling.
I know because I'm smiling too.
How can you not when having this much fun?
I want to keep on smiling until the very end.
That's why...

"The real race starts now!
And this time, I'm going to win!"
88.30029:
(I'm sure Kita is going to make her move soon.)

Ah, it's so wonderful.

No matter the time, no matter the place,
there she is, running ahead,
leading me forward so patiently.
Her hair and her racewear create a black silhouette, perfectly placed in my line of sight.
And surrounding that shadow... is the light.

(I want to pass her.)

I'm sure what lies ahead is even more dazzling when there's no shadows in the way.

I love it when we walk hand-in-hand.
Laughing, crying, and chasing after our dreams.

Sometimes, as a joke, you dash far ahead. But then, you always stop and ask,
"Are you coming?"

(But still...)

This is a sacred place.
It is a place where we should be civil and sincere.
Even if it's hard, even if we struggle, we must run until the very end.
That is the duty to those chosen for this place.

(But still,
isn't this so fun, Kita?)

I see the determined look on your face when you turn to me with a soft smile.
That's when I'm certain we feel the same. And that's why...

"I am going to win this race!"
88.30030: (Oh, was that a shift in your shoulders? Your legs look a bit unsteady, too. Oh, I see. You're about to kick off!) After an outstanding string of achievements, Matikanetannhauser is now taking part in this race. (I've watched the others run. I've studied their style, their habits, their timing, everything. But...) But such efforts mean nothing to her. It's the least she can do if she wants any chance at overtaking her opponents. (It takes more than that to win. You have to push yourself harder and harder and run faster and faster!) She knows racing is hard. She knows it in her bones how tough it is to win. But that all comes with the territory. She has to step up and push—outrun those two and win. "All right! I'm gonna hit this off with a BANG! "
88.30031:
Yukino! Go for broke!

Hm? Who'm I call'n to?
Look o'er there, it's that girl wav'n at us. The one whose smile just makes your heart melt.

She's like everyone's daughter, help'n to plow our fields and givin' us should'r massages. But most of all... seein' her run always cheers us up. And now it's our turn! We're here to cheer her on!

Huh? You're a fan too? Well, why didn't you say so soon'r? Aw come on, quit your weep'n. Today's s'posed to be happy!

Okey-dokey! Say it with me then! And a one, and a two, and a three...
88.30032:
Training is not only important in martial arts, but for all things in life. Running, dancing, singing, etiquette. Without training, they are like the untilled soil—cold and lacking in vitality.

That day, amidst a great many opponents, this warrior had claimed first place. To stand center stage is an honor that comes with responsibility. It must be done with pride.

The foundation of speech starts in the abdomen. Gather all your power with the soles of your feet planted firmly on the ground, young champion.

The audience wells in anticipation of the coming speech. In the end, she raises her two fists and shout,

"OSU!"

Her companion Sakura Chiyono O is stunned. The faces of the audience and performers break into smiles.

Her duties fulfilled, the warrior takes a deep bow and exit.
88.30033:
I totally thought I was gonna cry! 'Cause, like, ever since I was little, just the thought of this day would bring me to tears.

I'm here—at the winner's interview for the Derby.

But it's strange.
Not a single tear is coming out.
After all, I don't wanna forget this moment.
The sky is blue.
The people in the audience are all cheering and smiling. And I ran my heart out competing with my best friends. I want to remember this all!

I can't waste this time wiping away my tears. The three of us had promised we would race together. We encouraged each other, and we gave it our all. We ran all the way... to the place of our dreams!

"I'm Winning Ticket, the winner of this year's Derby—the best in history!"

But my dreams don't end here! They keep going on, and on, and on!
88.30034:
"U-um... How about we enter through separate entrances and then meet up inside?"

The two part ways and step into the welcoming, sweetly fragrant labyrinth of roses.

...But that was several tens of minutes ago.

The young girl jogs, now slightly out of breath.
She keeps searching and searching, but she can't find what she seeks.
And yet...

(Come on! I can do it! I know I can! I'll be the first to find you...)

(Just like when you found me!)

(I'm going to find you, I promise!)

Just as she turns the corner, her face flushes with joy and breaks into a smile.

"See! I found you!"
88.30036:
The optimal way to guide beginner racers is to manage all aspects of their racing career.

"Why did you decide on stretching when it wasn't in the plan?"

"I was trying to calm my temper. I am sorry that I took some liberties."

Temporary emotional lapses are to be expected. There is no need for concern. More important matters are at hand.

"Excuse me, Trainer Kashimoto! A little light stretching shouldn't affect the plan too much, right?"

"Wrong. It can lead to many problems. You shouldn't be doing anything 'lightly' in the first place.

Training, stretching, diet, sleep... All of these must be taken seriously."

I know the toll a racing life can take. How easily the bridge to one's dreams can crumble. The frigid cold of a lightless path.

"Now then... the runner's tunnel is a bit chilly today. Do another round of warm-ups. That should help."

I will keep up my management. It is my responsibility.
88.30037:
Was her first step upon the Emperor's path a miracle, or an inevitability?

Regardless, it was heralded by thunderous applause. With dignified bearing, she stood tall within the winner's circle.

The sound of camera shutters was a frenzied cacophony. Yet it bothered her not. She simply struck a bold pose, as though this were any other win.

A single finger, raised toward the sky.

As if to say this victory was preordained.

"That's one crown down."

Her murmur was drowned out by the raucousness of the cheers.

Her legend was only beginning.
88.30038:
The winner's circle.
The place where only those who prove victorious can stand.

As Sakura Chiyono O makes her way there, she's suddenly blindsided. Her idol, her greatest inspiration, stands before her.

She had marveled at her unparalleled speed and vowed one day that she would stand beside her. And now, through unwavering determination, victory calls Sakura Chiyono O's name.

At a loss for words, she takes careful steps forward as if she were in a trance. The racer who once inspired her smiles softly and reaches out to straighten out her sash.

The afterglow of her victory must have distracted Sakura Chiyono O enough to let it loosen. She blushes as the distance between the two of them shrinks.

Next to this proud and blooming flower, the bud of a tiny cherry blossom opens.
88.30039:
Welcome to the land of dreams, Umander Kingdom.
I'm the princess of this land.

Today is the day that I finally tie the knot with my prince. My people are in high spirits, ready to celebrate.

I stand at the altar, dressed in my gown, as my prince slowly approaches. And just when I reach out to take his hand...

Out pops out a large throng of enemies and their goons! Of course, the princess, together with the prince, will beat the bad guys to a pulp!

As a princess, and as a bride, I charge into battle!
Happiness is something you must take by fooooorce!
88.30040:
♪ A Buono Carrot Wedding Cake ♪

Ingredients:
To make the batter
60 carrots
9 kg flour
120 eggs
4.5 kg sugar
6 kg butter
12 Tbsp baking powder

To make the cream
7.5 kg cream cheese
600 ml milk
2 kg sugar

♪ Make sure to invite all your friends! ♪

"There's a lot of love baked into this cake, which makes it super-duper buono! ♪
Okay, Trainer. Eat up!"

"Hey, Kawakami. Is that huge piece all for you?"

"Of course it is! Oh, Akebono I truly admire your spunk! This princess has still got a lot to learn!"
88.30041:
Cute things. Charming things. Beautiful things. These are all things that don't suit me.

So I've always kept them at arm's length. Being glamorous will just attract unwanted attention.

But I want to grow. I want to become someone I can be proud of; someone who is no longer intimidated by the gaze of others.

That's why this dress is the symbol of my determination. It is my ally. It will give me strength.

Someday, this dress will befit me. And I'll be proud about it.
88.30042:
If you just keep pushing through, then victory will be yours... Puh-leeease. Only an amateur would think like that.

"Ha! I knew you'd come!" She closes in from the inside. Her body trembles slightly at the frightening sensation. However, this feeling...

(...I'm just excited!)

This is the moment she's been waiting for—no one is going to get in her way. No tricks necessary. All that lies ahead is a pure one-on-one battle of strength. How could she not be thrilled?

"Here I go."

The soft murmur of her opponent causes her to gulp. It's time to get down to business. It's time to...

"Fight!"
88.30043: White or black. Heads or tails. Win or lose. The gates flip open like the toss of a coin. Everything's up in the air—until someone crosses the finish. Or at least, it should be. But the big races aren't so simple. People've just gotta play favorites and make a fuss over who's gonna win. You really think the favorite's gonna win just 'cause she knows how to do a little fan service? What a joke. Races wouldn't be any fun if you knew the winner before it even started. Once the die's cast, the rest'll be up to Lady Luck. Those racers are going all-in for just a two-minute shot at glory—no guarantees. And that's what makes races exciting. Now... you'd better watch those gates. The fanfare'll start any second now.
88.30044:
The cheers die down. There is silence...
I can't hear anything.

"Hey, wait up, Sis!"

Hm? I could've sworn someone just passed me by.
Oh right. It's me. Me from back then.

This is my message to my younger self: Get faster.
Keep going until you can catch up.

"What do you mean you can't run anymore, Sis?"

No matter what they say, keep running.
Just look forward and with every ounce of strength...
Believe in yourself. Only then...

"Hey, how about we..."

"Run together again. Whaddya say?"

"All right... consider it done, Brian!"

"Each Umamusume has taken her place at the starting gate.
Let the race... BEGIN!"
88.30045: Slurp, slurp, sluuuurp... "Ah. This drink is so bubbly and sweet! ♪" Glance... "Hehe, you want some too, don't you? Too bad, so sad! No juice for you! ♪" Slurp, sluuuurp... "Yum! Looks like I'm gonna drink it all. Sorry you couldn't get a sip!" Slurp, slurp... "...You want some, right? Come on, just tell me already!" "..." "Hehe, fine. Have it your way. ♪ Here, have a straw." Slide... Chack. "Do your best to drink the rest up! There's only ice left though! Hehe! ♪"
88.30046:
"Yahoooo!"

The boat shakes as Winning Ticket effortlessly maneuvers her wakeboard into the air.

"W-wowie! She's so cool!"

"I heard tricks like that are totally impossible for beginners. You're amazing, Tickezo!

"Hmph, must be her wild instincts."

"Woo-hoooo! Again! Again!"

"Wow! This view is totally rad.♪ Tickezo, show us a gnarly 720 flip! ♪"

"Leave it to me! I've got this! Here I goooo!"

The girls cheer her on like the little splashes of water bouncing off the boat.
88.30047: "Huh? What?! HUH?! Why am I in the front?!" (Well, I was first in line, so it makes sense, but it's just a habit of mine. It doesn't mean I want to get on first!) "Hey, Spe! Don't squish my tail like thaaaaat!" "Huuuh?! Maruzen? What's with that pose? Don't tell me we're getting our picture taken?!" (No, no, stop. I can't let Vodka see me like this!) "Ah... Aaaaah! Anything but thaaaat!" CLICK! ☆ "AAAAAHHHH!"
88.30048: "The last one is... the seventh panel in the lower corner. Ugh, I left the toughest challenge for last. As long as I relax and make good use of my muscles, I should be fine!" "All right, deltoids. Listen well! We're not gonna overdo it. We're just gonna build power until it's time to release. And calves, you better not slack off and make me shift! Okay... I'm counting on you all!" "There!" Whoosh! (Dun-dun-dun-duh! ♪ Doo-doo-doo-doo-dooooo! ♪) "Yesss! That was perfect! Thanks, muscles! You worked just the way I wanted you to! I'll make sure to drink a protein shake later." WELCOME TO THE 2ND STAGE! ARE YOU READY? "Crap, it's not over?! ...Ah well, that's fine! Looks like our work here isn't finished just yet!"
88.30052:
Can you hear it?
Do you see it?

Our heartbeats becoming a melody.
Our tears becoming motes of light.

There for all to see and hear, in the limelight and in the shadows.

I've always wanted to say this—what I couldn't, back then.

But now, I know it can reach you.
Just as you've shown us wonders from the track, my track is this stage.

Has it finally reached you?
88.30053:
A duel in a dust storm at midday. Two wanderers, both confident in their arms—no, make that legs—stare each other dead in the eyes. Suddenly, a third scoundrel steps forward.

"Why, you two here look mighty tough!"

Hearing this newcomer's out-of-place, cheerful voice resound throughout the wasteland, the two crack a smile. Clearly, they both determine that this girl, whoever she is, isn't going to pose much of a threat. Then...

"Maybe y'all haven't heard, but I'm the new sheriff in town. I've got one shot, and both your names are on it. So, y'all ready?"

The bout starts with a bang, and she blasts forward like a bullet. The vagabonds finally realize—this girl is the real deal.
88.30054:
No matter how hard you've worked, no matter what you've suffered, the result is everything.

The winner is the leading actor who shines radiantly, blinding to the eyes of the supporting cast, the losers.

All my efforts go unrewarded, and what I desire is just out of reach. That's reality.

I get it... but I don't want to accept it.

"Heh... What a laugh."

No matter what I say, I'm going to run again anyway. I'm still dreaming of the day I shine.
88.30055:
She makes the air tremble, calling forth the dark clouds, and bathes the sky in purgatory. With her understanding of all things, she reveals what lies at their roots.

She is the agent of divine punishment who floods the sky with an abundance of bloody tears, echoing cries into the rusted void.

Written here is the name of this red apostle who makes all before her tremble and all things return:
Bloody Sky.

Published by Golden Publishing,
"An All-Star Gathering! The Royal Uma Army Series"

"Hmm, isn't this a bit over the top?
I guess it's good enough to put out there."

"If we plant a powerful image in their heads, they'll have their guards up in a jiffy! ♪"
88.30056:
"The resplendent chandelier, the gold-embroidered carpet, the lavish decorations. It has all the hallmarks of splendor... but it's something else that makes this ballroom first-rate."

"Is it the feathers of a phoenix? Or the stuffed golden crab?
Maybe the Pegasus mural on the ceiling? Or the statue of the sun?
No, it is none of these. What makes this ballroom first-rate is..."

"ME! King of Glamour!"

"Every space I'm in is always first-rate!"

"I am the King of Magic!"

"My fame runs wide to the ends of the world! It is I..."

"The King of Kings!"

"Ohohoho! Be grateful that you are in the presence of King!"
88.30057: Apocalyptic Gourmet! How to Make Rice Seed Risotto "First, have the NPCs bring in the rice seeds! Think of it as a tribute. This'll be on the test, so you better take notes!" "Next, fry the rice seeds over a flame. If you're using Uma King magic, know that even low-level power is enough to turn anything into ash!" "Whoa! You're burning up all the ingredients! Geez... That's some fear-inducing firepower. I'll get some new ingredients so we can start over!" "Fry them over moderate heat, then simmer them in bouillon broth for about twenty minutes and... Voilà! You can sprinkle with extra rice seeds to your liking!" "Ta-dah! The risotto is done! It tastes like all the hopes and dreams of the Umanest." "Here, try it. I betcha regular processed rice won't pump you up like this! Gahahaha! Welcome to Uma King's army!"
88.30058:
Until the ends of the earth
and ends of the sky...

"I'm never gonna lose."

"I'll always come out on top."

I'll leap as far as it takes—run any distance.

"I'll leave you in the dust..."

"...with my sights fixed firm on the finish line."

This is...

"Dance all you want! Just get used to doing it behind me!"

"Promise you won't cry, even if you lose."

...the story of the Umamusume whose goal is to shine.
88.30059:
What is joyous to some may be agonizing to others.

"Ohhh... Wh-wh-what should I do? When I look at the camera, I get so nervous and start shaking..."

"Then, please allow me to put my hand on your back. My data archive includes an entry that suggests that warmth eases tension."

"But if you touch me... something bad might happen to you."

"Negative. Unless I am operating with electronic devices, normal physical contact is safe. I will now switch to persuasive mode to complete this photo shoot. Referencing persuasion manual... Commencing persuasion."

"Rice, be a good girl and come here!"

"Wah! Uh, o-okay! Wow, Bourbon, you're so warm. Hehe... My body really has stopped shaking."

"You also feel warm. I can feel the heat transmitting to my core."

And so, we continue on, all while wearing the badge of competitors.
88.30060:
Dresses, accessories, spotlights?
What makes these girls shine the brightest is...

"There. The corsage is in place. Well, don't you look cute! ♪"

"Oh, wow! Nature, you did a great job!"

"Looks like you two are ready to go. Okay, let's start the photo shoot!"

"Oh! Tannhauser and Ikuno both look stunning in their dresses! Hehe. ♪"

"Heehee. ♪ You're stunning too, Nature!"

"What?! You don't have to flatter me! Come on, let's get this photoshoot over with!"

"Okay! Everyone get in!"

One star glitters, and then another. When they come together, they outshine everyone.
88.30061: The competitors' footsteps come together in harmonious melody. Tat, tat, tat! "Woo-hoo! We're in dresses! Are we getting photos taken like this?! Oooh, I'm so excited! My heart's pounding and stuff!" Swish, swish, swish. "I feel the same as usual. It's just a different outfit." Whoosh, whoosh, whoosh. "Yes. The dress is just a garnish to an already beautiful dish. What's important is showing how you normally are to your fans." "Oh, I see. How I normally am... Okay! Then, let's have a match to see who can get to the studio first!" "Hey! Wait a second!" "Haha, that's definitely how she normally is. All right, let's get a move on, too!" "Geez. Fine!" Tat, tat, tat! Tat, tat, tat! Tat, tat, tat! Their hems flutter, and their footsteps overlap into a sweet and pleasant chorus.
88.30062: "Sniff, sniff... Wow... It smells amazing. This must be the legendary makunouchi-style carrot lunchbox!" "Spe, let's wait until after rehearsal to have lunch." "Suzuka! Do you know where my gloves are?" "Didn't you tell the wardrobe assistant to make some adjustment to them?" Backstage, things are hectic, so there's no time to relax. But there's a part of me that finds this... ...quite special. "Perhaps it's because I'm here with you two." "SU-ZU-KAAAA!" "I'm right here, Spe. Heh, what could it be this time?" Well, let's continue with our preparations. We'll put on a show bursting with cheer.
88.30063:
