-----------------------------

Client: Mejiro McQueen
Size: Fit to measurements, with 0.1 mm leniency
Material: UMAGANE brand aluminum alloy

Other: The seventy-five-gram plate was not quite heavy enough for client's needs. Use an eighty-gram plate under the toe of the shoe, and thicken the sole accordingly. The cleats will be worn daily for race training, so the client will need a dozen spare plates in addition to the ones affixed to the cleats. Client is able to pick up the adjusted cleats in-store today.

-----------------------------

"...McQueen. I believe this should be all the information needed for your order."

"Thank you so much! I'm impressed you even adjusted the shoes' weight to my needs."

"Of course. Small details can have a large impact on a racer's future. A well-fitted pair of cleats is an invaluable partner on any Umamusume's journey."

"Well, I'm certainly feeling confident about this new pair. Hehe, I can't wait to try them on!"

"Yes... I'm looking forward to it as well."
88.30064: Grrrrr! You've awoken the mummies... The three teeerrible mummies! The feisty corpse who boasts divine speed and can never say no to a festival—Inari Mummy! The cadaver who'll snuggle ya up for eternity in her embalmed embrace—Super Mummy! And me, Naniwa's quickest carcass, the White Lightning—Tamamo Mummy! Pretty sick, huh? Picked up that little title for how my bandages streak through the night as I run. Now... do ya still think you've got what it takes to beat us, Indiana Oguri?! H-hey! Don't just stand there eatin' pumpkin pie! We're tryin' to do a bit here! Ughhh, and ya had to do it after the rest of us did the dorky poses. ...A do-over? Nuh-uh! You are NOT gettin' me to say that crap again! ...It's embarrassing, ya idiot!
88.30065: As the night of Halloween approaches, the air is rife with mischief as a lone girl calls upon the witch of legend. The witch surveys her timid visitor curiously, then flashes her a smile—a challenge. "I won't go easy on you, you know." "Yes, I understand that. But I seek your guidance nonetheless... for there is a wish I must grant!" The witch's eyes widen, impressed. She'd half expected the girl to shrink away. With a nod, she holds out her wand. The girl takes it, and raises it to the sky. "My dear friend... This time, I'll be there for you." Her words resound within the witch with such confidence, such warmth... they foretell great heroism in the small girl's heart.
88.30066: The ghost stands there with her back to me, lost in thought. All this time, she'd been working so hard—ever so hard—to accomplish an important mission all on her own. For you see, the ghost was afraid. She thought the others would be disappointed if she asked for help. That she'd be a failure. But that's not true... "I..." The feelings she'd been holding back start to spill out, word by word, and I think to myself: You know, the reason you worry about the others... is because you're so kind. —Excerpt from The Ghost and the Vampire, a Hand-drawn Halloween Tale
88.30067:
On the throne sits Symboli Rudolf, the Emperor who stands above all. Her austere appearance is a reflection of her unrivaled record.

Two Umamusume stand by her side, enamored by her influence—the talented Tokai Teio, who aims to follow in the Emperor's undefeated foosteps, and the tough Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi, who charges forward through sheer force of will.

"I'll definitely surpass her."
"I'll never give up."

The Emperor's lips slowly curl upwards into a smile. In her eyes, two futures are reflected, each shining as brilliantly as the other.
88.30068: I'm going to be waving my arms to make the sleeves fan out in half-moon circles... and the lights were positioned on that side of me during the rehearsal... so I should angle my head this way to really make my lipstick shine... "Yup, that's perfect! ♪" I've gotta visualize what'll show off my charm the best. They gave me this opportunity expecting #CuteCurren, and that's what I'm gonna give them. I'll do my makeup extra bold to bring out the festival mood—and to go the extra mile for the people waiting for me. But... ohhh, I wanna make it even cuter. "They're all cheering me on, so I'm gonna be the cutest I've ever been!"
88.30069: The smallest flicker in the coals can stoke a flame in the heart. The heat rises—boiling my blood, blinding and deafening me to all else. All I can feel is my own heartbeat, hammering at the bars of its cage. I fight to hold it back; the smoldering ashes fill my lungs, suffocating me. So I won't stifle the blaze any more. I'll let it run free. I'll run wild and free, and— I'll devour everything in my path! "It's time. Let's begin, Brian." "Heh. My mind's already on the hunt."
88.30070:
A light festival beat drums to life, and the dancers lift their feet. With each swing of the music and swing of their fans, the moonlight behind them is shaped into crescent arcs.

"Hah! Haaah!"

The lanterns flicker and swoon, glistening in the onlookers' eyes. All are fixed on the girl in the center of the light, but she offers her gaze to a distant view.

(I'm really danc'n it up... but I still feel like the same frumpy ol' me!)

"Be! Brighter!"

"Yukino's really going for it! ♪ I'd better step up my game too!"

"They're both getting so fired up... So I'll turn up the heat myself!"

With each step forward, the others race to keep up—to overtake. As the dancers whirl in and out of the lead, the true message of the festival takes shape.

"Ooh, I'm not giv'n up! I'll be the best danc'r of all!"

Everyone smiles, and the dance continues. The stage tonight is a celebration—a dedication that shines as bright as any big-city track.
88.30071: Comin' to you live—it's D! J! DAITAKU HELIOOOS! WOOOO! "Sheeeesh, you guys are on fire! ☆ But I think we can crank up the heat even more! I'll give you the cues, so let's! Get! LOUUUUD!" WOOOOOOO! "Yeah, that was a good warm-up. ♪ Now, right side of the stands, lemme hear where you're at!" WOOOOO! "Left side, lezzgo!" WOOOOO! "Center stands, make some noooise! ☆" WOOOOO! "All together now... IT'S PARTY TIME!" PARTY TIIIIME! "The vibes are off the charts! I am LOVING the energy, so keep it comin'! ♪ You guys make me wanna sing and shout!" "I can't hold back any longer... I gotta drop some beats! I'm takin' you all with me on a crazy setlist, so get ready to rooock! ☆"
88.30072: Today's an extra special day! It's like everyone's hearts are wrapped up in ribbons like presents, waiting for someone to open up all the feelings inside! "C'mon, Trainer, over here! You're gonna love the party we put together!" Smiles warm enough to melt away the cold. Laughter that rings out through the silent night! A party that shines brighter than all the stars twinkling in the sky! Ooh, it's so magical! A winter miracle! "Isn't this fun? I knew you'd like it! I just had to bring you!" I want you to see all the effort I put in. I want you to praise me. I want you to be happy. And maybe... maybe that's childish. An adult wouldn't get all flustered and excited over this, but... But y'know what? It's a special holiday! It's a special day to do special stuff with a special someone. I just wanna put a big sparkly bow on it... And give it all to you!
88.30073:
Starlight dapples the stone with every step,
You rush ahead a tile and a half,
Too stubborn... too stubborn to look back yet.

Patchworks of people line the market;
You weave through crowds like the needle tracks
And I'm the thread pulled idly past

Warm glows emanate from rows of stalls,
Stringlit wares, shiny baubles.
Steam rises over hot chocolate cups
Cinnamon scents blend into the dusk—

"What's the hold-up? Don't get separated..."
I realize you've turned my way and waited.

I nod and you avert your gaze
Stubborn again, a tile and a half away,
Not a step further, not a step less
Keeping me close and distant yet.

Occasionally, you glance back at me
And I pretend I didn't see
I somehow feel, if our eyes meet...
This precious moment will abruptly end
And next I know, you'll be tiles ahead.

On this holy night, walking moonlit streets,
I keep your pace carefully,
And you lead our way slowly, gently.
88.30074: "It's snowiiing! ☆★ Mayano, look! Snow as far as the eye can see!" "Oh wow! ♡ Let's go play, Marvey! What should we do first?" "How about a marvelous snowball fight? ☆ I'm gonna get you! ★" "Ah! That's freezing! Now you're in for it... Take this! ☆" "I'm not going down that easily! Ready? Maaarvelous! ☆★" Three hours later... "Whew... That was a marvelous match. ★" "Yeah, but I am wiped. I think that's enough playing in the snow for one day." "Enough... playing? ...No! There's never enough playing!" "Huh?! But we've been playing for hours!" "And the snow will melt!" "Yeah, when spring comes." "Exactly! So we've gotta play with it now! Right now! I don't want this marvelous moment to end... I wanna spend more marvelous time with you. ☆★" "I guess... you've got a point. So y'know what? Let's do this! ☆" "Ahahaha! Let's play with this marveous snow until it melts! ☆ And then in spring, we'll find another marvelous thing to play with! ★ And just like that, the whole year will be extra super-duper maaarvelous! ☆★☆"
88.30075:
I run. And run. And run... But it's not enough to pass the obstacles between us, let alone catch her.

I turn. Again. Again. Around I go... Up... and down. My mind reels—colors blur past—like I'm running atop a giant gear.

And then, I hear someone singing. It's beautiful... but the song isn't meant for me. I think... this whole time, I wasn't looking ahead of me. I was just watching her back.

That's right. All I saw was her. I couldn't see anything else. I wasn't running cleanly—I was running desperately, frantically... just trying not to lose sight of that faint shadow.

There's something stirring in me, diluting the essence of what I was. Transforming me into another gear on the track, chasing her loop after loop.

With each revolution, I lose more of myself. The clamor feels so far away. I can't make out whether the blurred mob shouts in cheer or fury.

As it all melts together into an indiscernible cacophony, one thing alone remains quiet and true—a thin thread—the path cleared in your wake.

(You're still there. And I'm still following!)

The golden disc beneath us whirls. I reach out, stretching my hand to hers—

...And in that moment, I left the world behind.
88.30076:
There's a scenery I see when I close my eyes.

Into the blinding flare of colors pouring over the horizon, figures run away from me toward the light. I'm standing there, watching their shadows, when I hear a distant call...

I can't quite place when or where the episode took place. I've racked my memories to no avail.

And so... It must have been something I saw in a dream. Some sort of nightmare—something dreadful I hoped would never come to pass.

I'm confident in that answer.

...Because when I open my eyes again, I see something completely different.

"Silence Suzuka! Silence Suzuka has done it again! A stunning runaway victory!"

I'm not really interested in daydreaming up what-ifs or letting nightmares cloud my vision.

I want to see new scenery—unimaginable ones—and I want to see it with my own two eyes.

Today. Tomorrow. Every day. Forever!
88.30077: "Oh, can this truly be? Before me stands a star, with beauty that could almost rival my own! Ahhh, you must be the Leporello to my Don Giovanni!" "Wowzers! Ayabe's kimono was the exact same pattern as I foresaw in my dream! Fortune has truly come to us today, pals—all thanks to the great Shiraoki!" "Ahaha! Ayabe, you look so pretty! Ehehe, I bet I know your secret too. You must've eaten tons of New Year's mochi, making your skin all mochi-smooth and soft! We should make a batch together!" "The year just started, and it's already chaos... Sigh... I guess I'm in for another craz—" "W-wa-watch ouuut! S-sorry everyone, but I don—I don't think I can stop! I'm going to crash!" "Ah?! W-wait, don't come barreling at me! "
88.30078: "Oh nooo, it's almost time for the karuta championship! Oh no, no, no, no! M-my hands... are shaking... W-what am I going to dooo?!" "For starters, you could sing Shiraoki's New Year's Fortune-Fishin' Song! If you say the words and dance the steps, luck's sure to come your way!" "Bring on the boons, gimme good luck! ♪ Grab your shades, here comes a bright New Year's dawn! ♪ The sun's a-rising, Mount Fuji's snowy cap is shining ♪ With a rosy smile singin' woooiya hoiya ♪ Fortune's on the way! ♪" "Woooiya hoiya! Fortune's on the way... ♪ Ehehe, you're right. I can' help but sing along." "Exactamundo! I'll lead you in with another verse, and then you take the next! Lucky lucky me, with my lucky pine sprigs ♪ Everybody gather 'round for some festivities ♪ Watch for hawks like you saw in your lucky dreams ♪ Playin' fukuwarai with a woooiya hoiya, ♪ Fortune's on the way! ♪" "Lucky lucky me, eating a New Year's feast ♪ Ultra super happy, life always has me winning ♪ Everything's so tasty, but don't eat the eggplant yet ♪ Save a taste of luck and woooiya hoiya ♪ Fortune's on the way! ♪" "Yep, I'm sure Shiraoki heard that prayer loud and clear, and sent a big ol' treasure ship of luck your way!"
88.30079:
I have so many goals I haven't reached yet... So many big, grand dreams of who I want to be—of a Doto who stands on top of the world with confidence.

If I could just reach the summit, I'm sure I'd be able to stand up straight and proud. But... I can't reach it, no matter how much I climb.

S-so maybe, I need to try standing a little taller. It's okay if no one notices a difference but me... I'll straighten my back just a bit, and let you give me a push.

And I won't look back, no matter how much I want to. And every time I think those bad thoughts, I'll remind myself to stand up just a little taller. I'll remember the warm hands holding me up.

Without another thought, words well up in me.

"I-I can... I can reach it!"
88.30080: "Is this... It's that old scroll of secret acupuncture techniques I borrowed from my master (without permission)! Wow, what a blast from the past! ☆ I never actually finished reading more than half, huh... Let's give it a little look-see." One must seek the mystic truths of Umamusume yet unveiled. One must commit to body and heart the weight of their actions. One must respect experience over talent. One must resist worldly temptations, and devote themself to training. One must remember that the needle moves as the heart does, confident or hesista— "Ah, wait! I almost forgot! I was boiling water for my ramen." "There, that's the cup noodles all watered up, but... Agh, I've gotta have something around that I can weigh down the lid with... C'mon, c'mon..." "Oh! I can just use the scroll! Boom, easy! It's nice and heavy, so it should hold the lid down perfectly. Wow, no worry! ☆" ...Three minutes later, Anshinzawa goes to get her ramen, and topples the cup over scroll-first. Not wow, all the worries.
88.30081:
Hey, that photo we took has arrived! Huh... what's up with this shadow? Don't tell me—it's the ghost of a football fish!

"Eek! The g-ghost of a football fish? Wh-where is it?!"

"Rice, please calm yourself. You should know not to take Gold Ship's remarks at face value."

"Uwaaagh! This is sooo touching! The tears, they just keep falling!"

"Didn't you cry enough back then? ...Sheesh, how do you still have tears to shed?"

"Ahaha... Oh, that's right! I gotta show Suzuka, too!"

"I thought you'd say that, so I had them send over the image data as well. Hehe, despite all the ups and downs we've gone through together, you all haven't changed one bit, have you?"

"Yup, yup! This is Team Sirius at its best, and I looove it!"

"M-mhm... I agree. Everyone's the same, but that's just fine... Hehe."

"Hmph. Well, it isn't a bad feeling, at least."

"You guys are totally right! That's why we should keep getting along as Team Sirius!"

"Let's stick together and give it our all—yeah!

"H-hey, why'd you take my line?!"
88.30082:
It's important to have a little courage. That's all it takes to make your first baby steps forward.

Take everything you're feeling and mix it up like cake batter. With a little time and warmth, your love will puff up extra soft and sweet, and then you can give it to someone with a big shiny ribbon!

Use that little bit of courage to perk your chin up and look them in the eyes, then say...

"Will you... accept this?"

My hands may shake a bit, but I do my best to put on a little smile.

Because I want to tell them—I want them to know how I feel!
88.30083:
"FLOUR! BUTTER! FLOUR! BUTTER! CREAM! AND CREAM!"

Recipes are naught but dead weight. Low temperatures are for slow bakers—not for her. All she knows is speed. Blinding, Bakushin speed.

"Whoa?! I accidentally got cream all over my face! ...Mmm! It's so delicious!"

"And now, for the final garnish—sakura! SAKURA! SAKURAAA!"

The flowers spring forth in intense bloom, the petals speeding toward the sky in a mad dance. In but a blink, the kitchen is sakura pink.

"There! All done! One Bakushin batch of sweets!"

With a proud puff of her chest, she hands the tray to me, and I can't help but crack a smile myself.

There's cream all over her hands, and sakura petals all over her clothes, but I think... that in and of itself is kinda sweet.

"HAAAHAHAHA! That look on your face—it's plain as day! You're over the moon for these sweets!"
88.30084: "Um, do I spread my fingers like this?" "Yep, just like that. Hang tight while I do the other hand, m'kay?" Is Flower even enjoying this? Why is it so hard to come up with something she'd like? But... Ugh, I can't just leave her hanging. I've gotta do something to help. Something... So I guess I'll just do what I do best and hope it works out. "Wow, it's so pretty! I feel like a big grown-up lady now!" "Wait, for real? Like you actually like it?" "Of course! My nails look amazing!" Whoa, nailed it! Guess it just goes to show that sometimes thinking gets you nowhere. You've just gotta give things a go!

I'm always cheering for you!' and then get outta the way lightning fast so I don't take up any of the next fan's time... Yeah. That's the plan." "We've all gotta be on our best behavior, or they might not do signings for us anymore... I've gotta make a good impression and show her what an honor it is to simp for her! I've got this!! Hang tight, I'm up next!!!!!!" With that, Agnes Digital walks forth gallantly, as though I'm watching a knight approach her lord. Bold, and strong... I think.
88.30086: 3,000 long, stamina-draining meters. A long, perilous slope stretching from the third corner. A difficult track that cannot be conquered with effort alone. A stream of sweat drips from her brow, threatening to blur her vision. Her heart beats frantically, like it's screaming for more oxygen to pump through her veins. Each rough breath scratches at her throat like flickers of flame. She asks herself why. Why does she keep running, when it hurts so much? Why does she continue to drag her heavy legs step after arduous step? Her mind doesn't have time to process an answer. But her ears flick unconsciously towards a rumble from the stands. A roar of cheers—of fans' hopes and dreams. She then clenches her teeth, biting down into the pain, and spitting it out. A sense wells in her gut—her fated rival is behind her. The large shadow she casts over the turf is getting closer. Closer. Closer. But she knows she can't look back. She won't give up. The only way to reach the peak is to keep running. ...And that day, the runner who refused to surrender took the crown of the best.
88.30087: "Huh? Is this thing... Oh no, Bright! Bright, stop! That's enough! ...I'm so sorry. I think the timer's display is messed up." "Huff... Huff... Whew. Now that you mention it, that last set felt oddly long." "Oh gosh... That was probably as long as three sets. A-are you okay?" "Mm-hm, just peachy." "You still have stamina after all that?! You must be really on top of your training! Do you think you still could have kept going if I didn't stop you?" "Ehehe, probably. Honestly, I probably wouldn't have noticed the timer wasn't working if you hadn't said anything." "Ahahaha! That's so like you! I guess some things never change. Hehe... Maybe it's because of how long I've known you, but seeing you crush that set has me all happy." "That's sweet of you to say. It's a good thing I've been training hard to live up to the Mejiro name. I suppose I'll have to keep on improving myself, little by little."
88.30088:
"So, how's it been since you two came to Tracen? Is it different than you expected?"

"Yes... It certainly isn't anything like I imagined. What about you, Kita?"

"Same. It's way different from what I thought."

"Huh? I-in a good way or a bad way? I hope you two aren't disappointed..."

"No, of course not. If anything... It's been far lovelier than I could have dreamed! The training, the races—everything's been so magical!"

"Yeah, me too! With all the exciting stuff going on, it feels like every day's a festival!"

"Whew... That's good to hear. You had me worried for a second. But... I think I was the same way when I first came here too. All this fancy new stuff left 'n right, and special things happening one after another... Tracen's still full of surprises even for me!"

"Really? Even though you've been here so much longer than us?! Ooh, what're we gonna do, Dia?"

"Don't look at me—I'm just as curious as you are!"

"Ahaha, I'm sure there will always be big, wonderful surprises in store for all three of us!"

"Right!"
"Right!"
88.30089: The stands are roaring with excitement. In the crowd, one man whispers excitedly to himself in a trembling voice. "I've been waiting for this moment... She had high expectations placed on her, but she was never able to take home the gold... Just like me. But now, she's finally won... Because she believed in herself and never gave up." "Was that marvelous enough for everyone? ☆ All of you are looking oh-so marvelous as well! ★☆★" Warm tears run down the man's cheek. He has finally realized the truth that has been lying in front of him the whole time... "I'm... marvelous, too..." And so, another marvelous light is born into this marvelous world.
88.30090: Your fangs threaten to sink into me with every step. Your graceful movements resemble a predator waiting for the right moment to strike the fatal blow. "I see that you're as sharp as ever. Perhaps you've been keeping up your training? How admirable." "Right, for once. Someone's got to protect our spoiled little Emperor from the eyes of the masses, now don't they? Not like you could do anything without being pampered." "Allow me to correct one of your statements. As I'm unable to resolve this matter expediently, I'll simply march to the beat of your drum for now." It's your turn, and the silence is deafening. I see your scorn replaced by apathy, when suddenly, a light bulb flashes above your head. "If that's how you want to play, then fine by me. But don't forget—you asked for this!" "Oh, such risky footwork! The most important thing between partners, Sirius, is trust. And so you don't forget it anytime soon, it's time for your private lesson." I can see your desire for control in each of your aggressive steps. In response, I will bring all I have and match you at every turn. Do not forget—you stand in the presence of the Emperor, Symboli Rudolf.
88.30091:
...Hey, what do you see from there? Sluggish shadows drifting through the night? Or perhaps dust from the dance floor, kicked up by someone's fancy footwork?

"Mhm, in there you'll only find a tent of tedium, spread around like a sloshy quagmire. They've only two choices—accept their muddy fates and sink, or writhe in vain defiance. How drab."

"However, I can present you with a third choice. Take my hand... and I'll show you how much fun this world can be."
88.30092:
Energy equals mass times the speed of light squared. In the end, everything comes down to equivalent exchange. What goes around, comes around. In other words, no matter how hard you try, you won't get any more than you put in... and that's fine by me.

"This is getting me hyped! It doesn't get better than !monad! Wooooo!"

That said, when needless noise gets mixed into the equation, all of that balance goes straight to chaos! But I won't stop...

"Fine by me. You want more? I'll give you more. I'll overload your senses until you drop!"

I live in a cache full of unknown variables...

"Come on, follow my groove! Ha... haha!"

Why am I trying so hard to suppress my laughter? ...Tch, guess I was the one being played. Well, I've solved the equation, so I'll pay my respects.

"...Until this beat of mine dies down, don't turn on the lights."
88.30093: I'm a fan of wearing blue and white. It's refreshing, but vibrant. Elegant, but not too pretentious. It's the number one color combo for the me I want to be. "Mhm, just like I thought—this is the number one fit for me! ♪" My outfit's all set. The frills and pleats look good, and I tied the big bow perfectly. A quick posture check... oh, and can't forget the smile! Yup, this is it—this is undoubtedly what an honor student on her day off looks like! "This is an important outing, so I have to make sure to go in my number one outfit! ♪"
88.30094:
You're always cheering somebody on. You encourage them, scold them, and share in their ups and downs.

Even today, you're cheering on someone from the stands up above. Despite waving a banner weighing easily over ten kilograms, you and everyone in the cheer squad continue cheering with your eyes fixed on the race, no matter how raspy your voices get.

You stand in the shadows, where light will never reach.

And yet, you continue exerting every last drop of your strength, all to fulfill your duty. You believe it's simply the right thing to do, and you take great pride in upholding this duty.

"Keep it up."

Suddenly, three words slip out of my mouth. They are spoken softly, quiet enough to be drowned out by even the sounds of everyday life. Words fated to drift away, and reach no other ears.

But then you turn around and face me, still waving your banner, and still cheering the racers on. It's only for an instant, as fleeting as the swaying of a flame in the wind, but I see it—your bright smile shining straight at me.
88.30095:
An exciting race unfolds itself before me as I watch from the stands up high. Every racer is bursting forward with impressive speed. Out of the blue, a strikingly loud voice rings throughout the venue.

"Nice turn! But they're hot on your heels! At this rate... Ah!"

I wonder who she's cheering for. She sounded pretty crushed just now...

"Good job, what a beautiful pass! I can tell you've been working on that! Now take it home—gooo!"

"Huh?! Weren't you cheering for the racer who was in the lead until now?"

The words spill out of my mouth, and the girl, Seeking the Pearl, looks at me with a warm smile.

"In a race, there'll always be a winner and a loser. There's always two sides, like light and darkness. But you know, when it comes to competitors giving it their all, everyone's the same, and I think we should celebrate that! Every racer deserves to be cheered for and praised! I support each and every one out there!"

Her words are pure and innocent, like a pearl. And in the face of her brilliance... I begin to see the world through a new lens.
88.30096: If I slip up even a little, they'll be hot on my heels. But wait, this sudden ovation of cheers during my most dire moment... This is just like... "Princess Fighter! Don't give up!" I'm in her shoes today, with everyone rooting for me the same way I used to cheer at the TV. "Now, Princess Fighter—punish evil!" She's the definition of a perfect princess, and my idol. "Gooo, Princess Fighter!" There's only one path left for me, for you see, a princess... "Never, ever loses!"
88.30097:
The track was in the worst possible condition. Even so, you treaded through the mud, broke out of the pack, and took the lead when no one else could.

Not even upturned turf, fierce rain, or racers blocking the way could stop you. You simply weaved your way past each competitor, leaving them behind, one after the other.

And each time you passed another racer, your sky-blue eyes shone brilliantly, as if you yourself had become like the vast sky—soaring freely forward, always just out of reach...

"Mr. C.B. finishes in first place! Mr. C.B. takes it all here at the first race of the Triple Crown!"

In that whirlwind of rain and mud, when visibility was at its worst, you stood above everyone else.

And then like a child, you wiped the mud off your cheek with the back of your hand, before slowly curling the corners of your mouth into an easygoing smile. Turning to the crowd, you stood tall and raised your hand to the sky.

Seeing that pose, the fresh memories of my bitter defeat instantly faded away, replaced by your gallant figure etched into my mind.
88.30098:
Brand new racewear for me! ♪ A first-place winner I'll be!

"With my racewear, I'm so happy! Running, running, yay! ♪"

"Hop, skip! Skip, hop! ♪ I'll give it my all, like 'blaaam!'"

A girl from my class is singing something to herself. It's not the first time she's done this, but for some reason, I find myself especially curious about her song today.

"...What kind of song are you singing?"

I walk up to her and ask a simple question. She looks like she's having so much fun, and her energy is infectious.

"Oh, it's my racewear song! I'm really looking forward to wearing it at my next race! I'll give it my all, like 'blaaaam!'"

She's singing because she's excited. And she's excited because she's going to run. Her explanation is so simple, but it resonates with me deeply.

"Good for you."

At some point, I forgot what it felt like to run for fun.

"Hey, do you wanna sing with me? Here, I'll count us in!"

"Whoa, r-right now?"

"A one, and a two! Hop, skip! Skip, hop! I'll give it my all! ♪"

"L-like 'blaaaam...'"

"Like 'blaaam!' Hehe, I can't wait for my next race!"

It's funny, I've only sung a single line with her, but I already feel a bit happier.

Right, races are supposed to be fun. There's no need to worry about the details. I just need to go out there and have fun!
88.30099:
Wow... Ikuno, you look so pretty... Just like a real bride!

"Thank you, Rice."

Wearing such splendid racewear in front of everyone... is making me surprisingly self-conscious. Still, this kind of opportunity doesn't come by every day. I just need to make it through this photo shoot...

"What?! Ikuno, you're getting married?! No way, since when?! I don't want you to gooo!"

"Huh? What're you doing, Turbo?! Look, you're getting in the shot, silly!"

"Nooo waaaaay! Don't leave me behiiind!"

Due to Turbo's misunderstanding, the photo shoot has been rendered into a state of mild disarray. That said, hearing the star front runner Turbo cry "Don't leave me behind!" is amusing in it's own way.

"Turbo, please calm down. I'm not going anywhere."

There's no way I'd leave now. After all, we're still in the middle of a race of our own.

Once we're done taking photos, I think I'll join Turbo and the others in their training.
88.30100:
Once upon a time, I went to a wedding.

When the bride smiled gently, the people around her also started smiling, and everyone was as happy as they could be. I'll always treasure that wonderful memory.

One day, I want to make everyone smile like that. I want to spread happiness to everyone around me. It's not much, but that's my dream.

I'll gather up my courage... and take that big step forwards. And once I do, I'll see smiles everywhere I look.

It'll be just like what the bride saw at that wedding—the sight of happiness. Up until now, I've only gotten a glimpse of that view.

"...I want to keep on making people smile."

I hope to keep on putting smiles on everyone's faces, so that someday, everyone can find their very own happiness.
88.30101:
Reckless.

For all her speed—so fast she seems to have surpassed light itself—she'll wear herself out before the finish line.

That is what everyone thinks. Yet she laughs, bound by her own spell.

"Ahh, how magnificent! How glorious! Be mine, sweet rapture!"

With reckless theories as her weapon, she dominates the track. To her, it feels as if the world has become more saturated, richer in color.

"Hehe. I wonder—what ecstasy awaits me in my next experiment?"

It is a feeling only she knows.
88.30102:
Dober's way too nice. She's always overthinking things and worrying about others.

Why do I know this? Because she's saved me so many times with her kindness and thoughtfulness!

"...Let the match begin!"

Entering the ring from the red corner, we have Tracen Academy's Phantom Bird—Masked El!

And in the blue corner, we have her opponent, Señorita Mejiro—Worrywart Dober!

The rules are simple! Listen to Dober, talk with her, and make her smile for a perfect ring out! ...Haha, I've got this one in the bag!

"After all, with this mask on, I'm pumped up, confident—invincible, even!"
88.30103:
In a picturesque forest, two Umamusume swing from a single vine, riding the wind.

"Um, Taiki?"

"What's up? Somethin' in your noggin?"

"There's something I've always wanted to try if I ever got into a situation like this... Well, more like say? Or even shout? Anyways, there's something!

"Roger that, Tannhauser! We're birds of a feather!"

"Right! Then, on three... One, two... three!

"Ahhhhh! ♪"
88.30104:
A water spirit's shoreline, a fairy's secret garden, and a door only revealed by starlight... After overcoming countless trials, the townspeople had finally reached their destination. And now, in front of them, was the most beautiful sight in the world...

"Well, I'll be! The walls are glowing baby blue!"

"It's like we've entered another world... Who knew a place like this existed?"

Faced with such a dreamlike scene, the townspeople could only open their mouths in awe and say...

"Ahhh, this is it! We've really entered the world of that story!"
88.30105:
To become the best racer in all of Japan.

That was my dream. It was my everything—what I'd promised to my moms.

Still, dreams are funny things, aren't they? I wanted to grab hold of mine, but like mist on a cold morning, no matter how hard I tried, I couldn't. All I could do was try my hardest—to keep on reaching for something that couldn't be reached.

But it was worth it.

All of my experiences—everyone I've met along the way—helped make my dreams come alive! I've had nail-biting races against my rivals, and I overcame hurdles inside of me that I thought I couldn't. There's been tough times, even sad times. But there's also been fun times and happy times. Everything I've been through has helped shape my dream!

Do you have a dream? Or maybe a burning desire? Then let's go chase it together! I'll help make your dreams come true!
88.30106:
If she wins this race, then both mother and daughter will have conquered the Japanese Oaks—an unheard-of feat. The venue is filled with both expectations and doubts, each weighing heavily on this one racer's shoulders.

But the moment the Empress takes to the turf, all the commotion is blown away in a burst of wind. For her, even the wind is but another of her subjects. She heads towards the starting gate with confident strides.

Her sharp eyes demand absolute fealty from all who face her. Her fingers clench into a fist so tight her nails dig into her skin.

She desires perfection. She hungers for victory. Her pride as Empress is her weapon.

"This race is mine for the taking."
88.30107:
Incoming weather report from your big sister Maruzensky. ♪

Today, my baby blue skies and wicked hot summer rays are going to shoot you through the heart, and I'm to blame! On the forecast: a frolic at the beach—don't forget to make a splash! ♪

But time flies when you're having fun, and we're looking at a chilly front rolling in with the sunset.

As for the evening, we can expect a dusting of localized sentimentality with just a dash of melancholy.

But don't fret, it's all A-OK! The sun's not the only thing that shines a light on me. I've got a totally hip-happenin' somebody who keeps the mood high and good times rolling. ♪

So enjoy that melancholy while you can, because tomorrow's nothing but a gentle, sunny day. ♪
88.30108:
This is what I want. This single, electrifying moment. As simple as I can get it, atop the greatest stage there is, with pinpricks of excitement and dread needling my skin. I wait for my opponents to up the ante.

My fate lies in the palm of their hand.

Then, the moment of truth.

In this single instant, we burn through all our luck. Flames burning bright before we flicker out.

Yeah. This is what I live for. As long as I've got moments like these...

"I couldn't quit if I wanted to."
88.30109:
"A good heart blossoms to its fullest."

(Source: A certain white-hot showdown)
Definition: Just as there are those who can run because they have someone they admire, one can also succeed by earnestly trying to support the person they admire.

(Commentary)
I was able to come this far because there's someone I look up to. So now, it's my turn to help her! I'm going to have fun, get fired up, and race her with everything I've got!
88.30110:
Welcome.

Back again, I see... Yes. I'll be working here for a while. To help out my dad.

You'll be having your usual black? Right awa—hmm? Milk? No, there's no problem. It's just... rare for you, is all.

Ah. A change of pace. I see... You sound... quite busy.

Um... I did say "right away," but could you... give me some time?

My dad's policy is to always cater to the customer, so... maybe I could make something just for you.

In what way? Well...

You'll just have to find out.
88.30111:
Whether it's a race or anything else, I'm always more excited than nervous in the face of a challenge.

People say it's because I'm brimming with curiosity, but that's not the only reason.

After I've overcome the challenge—once I'm past that finish line—there's this sparkly feeling that washes over me...

Even now, I can't wait for it to come. I can't help but wonder what lights are waiting for me once this race is won! So I'm gonna steer this thing like it's never been steered be—

"Her blue scarf trailing in the wind. ♪ She turns the wheel and the speed machine sings! ♪"

"Teio, oo! ♪ Teio, oo! ♪"

"Teio, oo, ooooo!"

"Aw, come on, Turbo! I was being all serious! Don't go making up some weird theme song for me!"
88.30112: Another day, another training session with Twin Turbo. She races around the track at top speed. "Huff... Huff... Pant..." But she's not pacing herself at all. With each lap, her pace slows. "Yo, Dual Booster! Isn't it about time for a break?" "It's Twin Turbo! And I'm doing one last lap, so Teio—time me!" "I mean, the harder I try, the faster I get! That's how it works in my games, too! No way I'm ever giving up!" "And if it's like my games, I haven't activated my unique skill yet! Let's go, Turbo Booooost!" Twin Turbo blazes away once more. Nevertheless, she quickly loses steam, and her running gets shaky. Still, the way she just keeps going, as though forward is the only direction she knows... "Man, she's so cool..."
88.30113:
Aircraft built of steel, soaring over the mountains.

Such a sight is commonplace in reality. All one needs to achieve it are aerodynamically sound blueprints and the right construction materials. But this place is different...

I've never seen these materials before, and apparently there are new laws of physics I need to catch up on.

I knew it. If I want to make this project a reality, I'll have to do further research on this world's underlying principles.

"Hmm... Is this material this world's version of titanium? And here we have a steam engine, one of the greatest firsts in technological history..."

"Oh? A communications device? An electromagnetic geo-transmitted power system? And a steam compression-based semi-perpetual motion device?"

"Wait, but that implies that this alloy's durability can withstand the pressure! Are you saying it's more durable than even tungsten?!"

"Yeah, uh, this is a fantasy setting. Pretty sure anything goes."
88.30114:
"These portraits are the pride of our house. A history of deeds achieved and honors bestowed."

A clear voice rings out from upon the elegantly styled landing. Portraits cover the wall from end to end, and a single girl stands before them. Her appearance is delicate, almost ephemeral, yet within her eyes is a cold, clear dignity.

"These are my mother and grandmother. Victors of many a race, and recipients of URA awards besides. Even among the history of our house, they stand tall and radiant."

White porcelain fingers trail through empty air. She holds a graceful right hand over the crimson ribbon upon her chest.

"Every member of our house strives to do the same—without exception."

Her words echo across the atrium.

The wall's countless eyes all gaze at the girl's back.
88.30115:
Halloween costume photo shoot time! Wahey! ☆ You're looking way grammable, Palmster! I'm gonna snap a few!

"Whoa! The set, the costume quality—this is the real deal! We're gonna have so much fun!"

"Say less, girl! You're killing that devil costume! A trillion points!"

What's the word for it again? Right, you're be-witching! The older sister look is totally your vibe, Palmster. ♪

"Now get ready, it's photo time! Give me your best devil impression!"

"Uh, impression? That's kinda embarrassing..."

"Girlboss, just send it! Pretend you've got greed on the mind and you're gonna take what you want!"

"Take, huh? Okay, I'll give it a shot!"

"Hey little snack, you're smelling kinda sweet. I think I'm gonna give you a little nibble... ♪"

Whoa, talk about a zap to my heart, Palmster! You can eat me right up, low-key! Aaand snap! That's one hella fire pic!

A smiling devil on a moonlit night. Major Halloween vibes, check!
88.30116:
Halloween costume photo shoot time! I'm gonna take some way grammable pics of you, Helios!

"Waheeey! Happy Halloween! ♪ How 'bout it? Is my angel drip legit or what?"

"Hehe, for sure! An upbeat style's the perfect match for you!"

I mean, you're always brightening up your surroundings and making the mood, like, wahey! You're the angel with the rizz!

Okay, give me whatever moves you've got! I'll follow you and snap some pics!

"Yo, no cap?! Then I'm gonna go hand out candy to everyone!"

"Wahey! ☆ Your angel's comin' through! Step right up if you want some candy! ♪"

I didn't see that one coming! You can always count on Helios to blast the vibes... Oh, this has gotta be the best pic.

A shining angel under the sun! Time for this Halloween party to get started!
88.30117:
[Windy's Demon Queen Castle Plan]

<Demon Queen Castle Concept>
It's Demon Queen Windy's Castle of Horror! All who enter meet a gruesome fate, falling into the depths of terror itself!

<Plan>
•Size: 1 classroom!!!
•Pitch-black! Blackout curtains on the walls!
→ Super dark castle = super scary!
•Last boss: ★★ Demon Queen Windy ★★
•If you want to reach the Demon Queen, you have to pass the trials!
•Make it a windy maze so everyone gets lost!
•Trials:
→ Hidden keys and lots of scary traps and boxes.
→ Fighting monsters.

<Monster Candidates>
•Really big monster (Big = Scary!)
•Pumpkin monster (floats)
•Demon (Ties you up if it catches you)
•Jiangshi (You become one of them if they bite you)

Once everyone's fallen into the depths of terror, the Demon Queen's army will reign supreme!!!
88.30118:
It's time.

With each step forward, the cheers, my footfalls, my heartbeat—they all fade. Yet...

My soul howls in anticipation. I've already had my fill of bitterness. All that's left...

"Is to bite down on my prey."
88.30119: There was regret. There was grief. There was contrition. But alongside it all, there were prayers for the generations to come. How noble, how magnificent our predecessors were. How sublime their caring hearts. "One day—and that day willcome—I will prove it to them." I will prove that all their prayers have reached us, here in the future, and are pushing us ever forward.
88.30120:
Heartfire Bearers Reignition Ceremony Practice

"You're incredible, Yaeno. You move like you don't feel the heat of the flames at all. I'd love to learn from your example—is there a secret I'm missing?"

"No, a novice such as I has nothing so grand. As strange as it may sound, it's simply that, when I dance, I do not feel the heat."

"I see. They do say that worldly sensations are but impermanences of the mind."

"If I truly have attained such mental focus, then I must be grateful. Hehe. I'd thought my single-minded nature was a bad habit, but I suppose it may also be a weapon, depending on one's viewpoint."

"I'm sure it is."

"In that case, I hereby swear on my name as Yaeno Muteki. Whether raging fire or wavering heart should bar my way, I shall fulfill my duty! Even should this body of mine be scorched by unrelenting heat, I shall remain steadfast and see my dance to completion!"

"Hehehe. Such inspiring spirit. But we can't have you being scorched, so let's practice dancing safely, all right?"

"...Right!"
88.30121:
Fan Appreciation Event Letter of Invitation

This is Mihono Bourbon, a member of the event committee. On behalf of all Umamusume, thank you for always supporting us.

All of us have reached where we are today by running toward the goals before us. However...

We were not alone. Not when our hearts were captured by the dreams we saw, nor when we lost hope when faced with insurmountable walls.

Your support was there with us. Each time we heard your encouragement, we rose to our feet and set our sights on new dreams.

The footprints we've left together with you will soon round the second corner.

To use racing as a metaphor, once the warm-up is complete, it becomes time to put all of one's preserved strength into one's legs and run.

As such, we will be holding a fan appreciation event to express our gratitude for the encouragement you've given to us, as well as to commemorate the long race ahead. You are cordially invited to participate.

Now, and in the future, we will continue to run alongside you, our irreplaceable fans.

"There! How does that sound?"

"Amazing... You removed all the stiffness without changing any of the content!"

"I agree with Suzuka. Conjecture posits that this invitation letter is sufficiently casual enough to entice fan participation. In short, it is, as they say, wonderful."

"Ehehehe! Still, it only came out so well because of the care you put into the original message, Bourbon! ♪ Now all that's left is to make sure everyone has fun on the day!"

"Yes. I simply, to use the common phrase, cannot wait."
88.30122: One, two, three-four-five, six-seven, eight, nine-ten. A metronome that strays is one that has failed in its duty. Tick, tick, tick—it carves time away in even intervals, without exception. Its beauty is my guide. I lend an ear to it, and thus I maintain equilibrium. And yet... One-two-three, four, five-six-seven, eight-nine, ten. My metronome has gone askew, but I do not correct it. I place it into the box of lost memories and close the lid. Deep emotion, the past, merriment, nostalgia, envy, tears, tenacity, again and again! They press on me from all sides! Like a miscalibrated clockwork toy, I cannot control their rhythm! Danke! Danke! Danke! All that remains is sheer, unbound joy. Danke! For I can find naught else to say!
88.30123:
"I didn't think you were capable of making a face like that."

Narita Brian's ears perk up at the sound of Air Groove's voice. She turns to its source, glaring at the gray-haired girl as if to say, "Got a problem?"

"I'm just saying the photo turned out wonderfully—it has a certain air of festive cheer to it. To be honest, I thought you weren't a fan of the holiday season, but it appears I was mistaken."

"Well, it's the one time of the year my sister won't nag me about how much meat I eat."

"Haha, I'm glad to hear it. Even Hayahide wouldn't go so far as to ruin the holidays, I see."

"Besides," Narita Brian whispers beneath her breath before looking up at the Furlong Tower.

"I don't mind festivities every once in a while."

"Well, it looks like you and I agree on something for once. I'm of the same opinion."

With the Furlong Tower flickering brightly before them, both Narita Brian and Air Groove sit in silence and watch the lights repeatedly blink on and off.
88.30124:
The day before the Tracen Academy winter holiday party, Air Groove asks Fuji Kiseki for some advice.

"Ahem... 'Happy holidays, everybody. I'd like to express my gratitude to you all for coming to Tracen Academy on this joyous occasion.' I was thinking about opening with that."

"Hm, I can tell that you're speaking from the heart—that's for sure! But it might be a bit too stuffy given the season."

"I had a feeling... But I can't help it when I'm speaking as a member of the student council..."

"Well, I guess it's true that you're always mindful of your surroundings! Then how about this? Pretend you're Santa Claus—act it out! 'Ho ho ho ho! Happy holidays!' Like that! Now you try!"

"What?! F-fine... "Heh heh heh! Happy holidays!" How's that?"

"Hm... Not quite! Less sinister, more silly!"

"Are you calling me evil?!"

"Hahaha! Yeah, like that! Just keep being expressive, Air Groove! I think that's a good starting point."

"Hm... Is that so? But I suppose you're right. My mother wouldn't approve of me like this. The holidays are meant to be a joyful season. And in order to create such an atmosphere, I must deliver a joyful message."

"Exactly! Hehe... I can't wait to hear your speech, Air Groove!"

"Of course. I promise to deliver."
88.30125:
I'm not going to ask for your thoughts.
Why? Because I put my all into my performance onstage.

I sang until my voice went hoarse.
Each of my moves had enough force to punch a hole in the ground.
I gave everything I had because I wanted you to notice me.

This is my message to you—a confession of my sincerest feelings.

"My dear Brian, I'd like you to join me on stage next time... as long as you stand to my side."
88.30126:
Though this race is a gathering of the fiercest GI winners, Yamanin Zephyr has yet to achieve any notable results.

It's only natural that she isn't garnering much attention.

But soon, people will know her name. They'll realize their mistake of overlooking this gentle gust.

"Hyaaaaah!"

The wind personified, Yamanin Zephyr starts by quickly breezing across the track.

By the fourth corner, she's already in third place. From there, she dashes straight into the lead.

Fast and free is the wind—more than anyone, and anything. This is the same wind I witnessed back then.

The howling tempest refuses to let anyone past it.

"So this is what it's like to become one with the wind... and what a calming breeze it is. But the wind continues to blow further on, so I too must continue to ride this current. The true wind lies at the end of this path—faster and more furious than all else."

She storms past the finish line and raises her right hand high towards the skies above.

At the same time, a fresh gust of wind blasts across the turf—a sure tell of the blessings to come.
88.30127:
"Hey, Spe. Do you know about the secret meaning behind hanetsuki?"

Grass asks me this as she raises a brush dripping with black ink towards my face.

"The secret meaning behind hanetsuki?"

"Well, the nut at the end of the birdie signifies good health. And the paddle is given as a gift during New Year's in hopes that the recipient will grow up to be healthy and beautiful. Basically, it wards off bad luck."

"Wow!"

"So hanetsuki was never meant to be a competitive game—you hit the birdie back and forth for good health!"

"Whoa, I never would've thought that! If that's how it is, then we gotta keep our rally going for as long as we can! ...Oh, Ms. Wonder! I have a question! Is there also a reason why we paint the loser's face with ink?"

"Great question, Special Week. Some theorize that the black ink was meant to ward off evil spirits, which made painting someone's face an act of protection from potential harm. That way, even if a feather falls off, you can simply paint your face to stay safe."

"So it's not just a punishment for losing! ...All righty!"

Special Week squeezes the brush in her hand and takes a deep breath.

"One large circle around your right eye so you can run all year without getting hurt. A diagonal line on your left cheek so you don't get sick. And another line on your left cheek to make an 'x' so you can eat lots of yummy food and laugh a whole bunch!"

"I put my well-wishes into every stroke, so let's keep running together as both rivals and friends—now and forever!"

"Thank you so much, Spe! Hehe, I think you used a bit too much ink though."

"Huh? Whoa! You're right—I'm so sorry!"
88.30128:
A young girl silently descends the snow-covered stairs. She hums, lace umbrella in hand and glossy tail swaying from side to side.

Suddenly, a photographer calls her name. She shakes her tail once more before turning around slowly—a breathtaking sight, indeed.

Her gorgeous face is covered by the umbrella's shadow. The passionate red against a pale white garners attention.

She gracefully rotates her neck, her eyes still trained behind her. Her hands are placed elegantly upon the handle, while the umbrella itself continues to envelop her figure.

The girl's beauty is jaw-dropping. Though clearly visible, her bewitching presence is almost ethereal, as if she could fade into thin air at any moment.

For a second, our eyes meet. She smiles, appearing to be pleased.

"Hehe. Aren't I just perfect? As a great witch in training, I can take on any form I want! ♪"
88.30129:
One by one, in the moments before the break of dawn, the lanterns representing the many shrine maidens flicker to life.

The flames of faith spread—for those girls will surely see it through.

"They're beautiful..."

The gentle lights ward off the harsh winter cold of night. These pure souls, with thoughts of others close to their hearts, look off into dark distant mountains where the light no longer shines.

May the others find this beautiful warmth.

And may our prayers reach you two—so you may understand that those of us lighting these lanterns have not given up on you yet.
88.30130:
"All right, on to the next song. I'm sure you already know what it is, right?"

"Yeah, the birthday song!"

"That's right. It's a song celebrating your birthday. It means congrats for being born—and thank you. But apparently, the song used to mean something different. It wasn't just for one special day of the year—but something you sang every morning as a kind of greeting."

"Really?"
"Good morning, Miss Miracle!"

"Hahaha. Yep, good morning to you too. All right, I'm going to play the piano now, so sing along with me, okay?"

"You, me—we all greet a new morning every day.
So if you're lying in bed and feeling lonely,
think about how we all sang this song together.
Then, remember this...
We go to sleep not because it gets dark outside,
but so we can say 'good morning' the next day."

"The darkness of night always comes before a new dawn. Likewise, I'm sure that a bright future awaits you all."
88.30131:
Marvelous ☆ Chocolate!

Step on up and give this chocolate a try! ☆ It'll put you in a marvelous mood—guaranteed! ★

"Wow, this maple leaf-shaped one tastes super unique! It's almost like I'm eating maple syrup, but with hints of flower nectar in it! This is amazing!"

"This one is shaped like a sports car. It looks cool but seems kinda hard to eat... Wait, what's this fascinating texture? The side mirrors are melting in my mouth!"

"Whoaaa! This Swan Lake-themed chocolate is making me feel Odette's sorrow! It's like a ballet scene is playing out in my mouth!"

Hahahaha! ☆ Strange, isn't it? Even the weirdest of chocolate can taste good—but you won't know until you give it a try! ★

The same applies to life! It's impossible to know what'll happen unless you give it a shot first—and that feeling of uncertainty is what makes life marvelous! ☆ Now go ahead and enjoy the rest of this marvelous chocolate! ★
88.30132:
"Welcome! I'll take you to your table!"

"Oh. Why thank you, Biko! ♪"

"Hey, Bono! We're practicing for the real deal, so you gotta pretend to be a customer! Anyway, right this way, please!"

"Here's your Assam tea! Wait, no. I mean... Here's your order of Assam tea. Its rich flavor complements the sweetness of our confectioneries. I've... brought some... for you... to try!"

"A-are you okay?! If you're bringing that many sweets, you need to use both hands!"

"A hero faces all difficulties head-on! I must rise to the occasion—just like Ryan or Ines would!"

(That's right—I need to become an ally of justice that everybody can count on!)

"Thank you for waiting! Here's your Ultimate Extreme Pegasus Sweet Paradise!"

"Whoa! You didn't drop a single piece! You seriously carried all this by yourself? Talk about amazing! You're so cool—it's like you're a superhero or something!"

"R-really? Hehe! ♪ Well, enjoy your food!"
88.30133:
Hey, everybody! Are you feeling buono?! ♪ For today's Umasta livestream, I'm gonna make some delicious bitter chocolate!

To be honest, I was pretty on the fence about sharing today's recipe. I mean, not everyone likes bitter chocolate, right? I like to make things that everybody loves—like chanko stew!

...But then I met this one little hero who helped me realize that I needed to be brave too!

So here I am now, streaming this live. I want to share my favorite chocolate with you all! That way, everyone can laugh and feel buono! ♪

"I wanna try Bono's chocolate!"
"Me too! I wanna try some!"
"Now I'm curious about this bitter chocolate..."

Right, um... Let me show you exactly how much cacao to add... Ah, but before that, I have something to tell you all first.

Happy Valentine's, everybody!
88.30134:
Persistent superiority. Captivating grandeur. Loving devotion.

This wondrous body is meant for running, and running alone. These amethyst eyes gaze on but a single goal—flawless glory.

Chrysanthemums, cherry blossoms, oaks, and roses—every flower bows its head. Jealousy, envy, ambition, and resolve—such earthly desires are to be abandoned.

She runs—and wins.

She, whose name is...
88.30135:
I hear it all the time.
"It's impossible to climb a wall that high."
"I'm sure somebody else will do it one day."
"There has to be someone who can do it..."

But those are nothing more than excuses! If no one's done it so far, that's all the more reason to try! Throw aside your fear! Ignore your desires to give up! Just run!

And if you still can't take that leap of faith, just look at me! Follow my lead—I'll show you the way!

That's what it means to be an ace—Katsuragi Ace!
88.30136:
The echoing sound of cleats trampling the ground envelops my entire body.

What a ruckus... They're just like me.

The same goal, dream, and destination to reach. The same fire in our eyes. The same fire in our hearts. Since we share this much, shall we run the turf together?

"Not happening."

Nobody... will be my equal. I won't allow it.

Only one will stand above the rest. So I'll run... I'll run... I'll run as the one. I'll emblazon this track first—then the world.
88.30137:
"I bestow upon you wisdom. May the torch of knowledge lit by our predecessors guide you."

"Let me hear your distress, for the path you take has been tread before. Follow the footsteps ahead and you will escape this dark forest."

"Need courage? Then I'll tell you a story—of a time when the runners of yore took their first step forward."

"Though they span eras and their forms differ, the cleat marks in the ground are unchanging."

"We will continue to tell this story, one that has been woven over the years, and leave no thread hanging."

"And we will serve as a connection to the Umamusume who run today!"

"From legend to legend—blessed be the ones who follow."
88.30138:
I close my eyes and try to remember you. The first thing that comes to mind is your back, moving further and further into the distance.

Your running almost reminds me of a dance, and it's so cool that I can't help but laugh.

It's frustrating, don't you think? I can't even see what kind of expression you're making. And no matter how hard I try to overtake you, I always end up falling short.

At the very least, I wanted you to turn your head and look my way—as if to tell little ol' me to never give up.

But my dreams are still far off. The experiences I've had and the desires I hold aren't enough.

Which is why, with this dance... I'll make sure you'll never be able to forget about me!
88.30139:
Growing bored of the unfamiliar ball taking place, I head to the balcony. There, I run into Mejiro McQueen, who appears to be a enjoying the night's gentle breeze.

"Are you here for a moment of respite as well?"

Instead of answering honestly and telling her that I couldn't find a partner, I simply smile wryly.

"Could it be that you, too, are running away from all the invitations to dance?"

I nod vigorously, hoping not to appear too pathetic before her. I have no idea where this self-consciousness is coming from, but it makes me turn my gaze away.

"I'll be heading in now."

"You should come as well—and join me for a dance."

Without even waiting for a response, Mejiro McQueen starts walking away. She turns around and glares at me for a single moment before resuming her quick pace. As I anxiously scurry after her, I notice a slight spring in her step.
88.30140: Your movements are reminiscent of flowing water—graceful and elegant. But it's clear to me by how you dominate the spotlight with your supple legs that you aren't satisfied with these cheers. "Nice going, McQueen! All the competition is looking at us! Hehe, we'll win Best Date for sure!" "I see you're already working yourself up. You do know you're rushing, yes?" "Well, I mean, at this rate..." "At this rate, we'll only win Best Date—that's what you meant, correct?" "Hehe, that's right! We've gotta reach even higher! C'mon, follow my lead!" Deep breaths. Gentle, refined steps—like a feather dancing across the skies. However... "I'm afraid simply following you won't do. I have my own pride—and heights I wish to reach. I shall go further and beyond!" "Hahaha! Now that's the McQueen I know—my one and only partner! We'll show them what a best date really looks like!"
88.30141:
Mihono Bourbon begins eating. Hoping to efficiently replenish her energy, she silently consumes her sushi rolls at a clockwork pace.

"The sushi rolls you made are beautiful, Bourbon. They're perfectly round."

"I rolled them with a constant power output. You can have one if you like."

"Thank you. I think I will."

"Hey, Bourbon. Would you like to exchange one of your rolls for a slice of my terrine?"

"Try some of my fried chicken too! My parents run a lunch place, and they taught me all their tricks!"

"Here, have a taste of one of my sandwiches! I made them faster than you can say 'Bakushin!'"

"Thank you all."

Mihono Bourbon smiles to herself as she accepts the different foods.

(I've been replenished by a special type of energy from these exchanges. I want to change the others' statuses to one of "enjoyment." However, it's unclear whether or not I possess the ability to do so.)

For a moment, Mihono Bourbon purses her lips, but she relaxes upon looking at the other four girls.

"I've determined that the most important attribute of this energy is an 'honest smile.' Now commencing mission 'Return the Favor.'"
88.30142:
The moment Sakura Laurel catches the ball, memories of her childhood flash through her mind.

Too weak to participate in such strenuous activities, she would simply watch as the others played. She'd spend her days sitting on the sidelines with a smile, passing back the ball should it roll her way. But the truth was that she always wanted to run alongside everyone else.

And today, for the first time, she understands what it means to work as a team—to place trust in one another. It feels exhilarating.

Sakura Laurel digs her feet into the ground and jumps with all her strength.

"I want to win—as a team!"
88.30143:
To my dearest partner,

We used to be stuck at the hip when we were little. Even if my legs failed me, you'd carry me far and wide. I'd pedal and pedal, just happy to be able to move with my own two feet.

At one point, I remember the two of us striving for heights that others claimed was impossible to reach. We climbed that seemingly never-ending slope, constantly falling. But when we reached the top and looked down at the beautiful sea beneath us... Well, that experience still motivates me even now.

Which leads me to this very day. I've witnessed another beautiful sight after working my hardest together with my friends—a sparkling stage illuminated by countless glow sticks and filled with the sounds of laughter and cheers.

It shone as brightly as the day you and I stared down on those dazzling waters—and both were moments I would never have experienced on my own.

Without a doubt, you are the one who has carried me this far. One day, I hope the two of us can go on another adventure to see things we've never seen before.
88.30145:
Welcome to Tracen Academy...

Umamusume. They are born to run. They inherit otherworldly names, and are inspirited by dreams most chill and laid-back. Now, they leisurely dash through their days of youth... Is this really all there is to their lives?

There are days when lightning strikes, and also days when things beyond the scope of human knowledge happen. Likewise, there are days when absolutely nothing happens. Is this really their day-to-day?

Now, what will today be like?
88.30146:
The starting line of the Procession. From here, it's easy to see the Entwinement—sole slates burning, sparks signifying dreams that rise up before disappearing into the night sky.

"Oguri, what're ya doin' starin' off into space? It's almost time for the Procession."

"Well, um... I was just thinking about how one day I'll need to write my own sole slate to give to someone. And when the day finally comes, I wonder what I'll write... There's so much that comes to mind, but it's impossible for me to decide—no matter how hard I think."

"Haha, obviously! No point in thinking about it just yet—right, Inari?"

"Yeah! The best thing we can do to face tomorrow is to give our all today!"

"Took the words right outta my mouth! In fact, why don'tcha try making tonight something you'll wanna right about?"

"Make tonight something to write about... Yeah, I'll do that."

Tama and Inari are right. All there is to do now is run toward the goal ahead of me.

One day, I'll fill out my own sole slate—and when I do, I want to fill it with as much gratitude as I can.
88.30147: Woooo! The cheers from the stands pour down on her—powerful enough to clear the clouds from the sky above. But unlike a gentle drizzle, the voices filling the arena are hot with passion, hitting her with unbelievable force as she stands atop the turf. This wasn't your everyday race—it was a battle. Jungle Pocket's dream of becoming the strongest—of catching up to her mentor and friend—led her to today's result. After all, only she who stands at the very end can proclaim herself the strongest. "Ruooooogh!" She raises her head and lets out a triumphant roar as she bathes in the glory of victory. Woooo! The cheers and applause show no signs of dying down. She's opened the door to the beginning of a new era. This is her origin race—an enticing show almost too powerful for its viewers.
88.30148:
What a wonderful time of a wonderful day. I twirl my colorful ribbon around my finger as I wait for you to come. Finally, I hear footsteps—which sound lighter and... giddier than usual.

"What's with the skipping? Quit acting like an idiot..."

Peering through the veil, I spot a huge grin spreading across your face—a look of pure joy.

"Ugh, why are you happier about this than I am? All I'm doing is getting engaged with my racewear... Hehe..."

I'll give you a break this time. Today, I'm shining at my brightest. But you should know better than anyone else that this isn't happily ever after. Not yet, at least.

That's right. It's a wonderful time of a wonderful day. I'm only letting these pastel colors show for a brief moment.

"Save your best smile for later. Our goal is still far, far away."
88.30149:
At long last, we've finally arrived. Here, I'll draw you a few stars for a job well done. Big ones, small ones—I can draw them all.

We've really been through a lot, huh? Still, even with the friends I've made, I won't be holding back in my races. We have to get our sales up, after all. We're so close to the Machan comics hitting a million copies sold.

Oh, how's the Machan Doll I gave you holding up? There's much more where that came from, so I recommend you prepare some space in advance.

Before you know it, your arms will be overflowing with dolls. In fact, you won't be able to carry them all even if you use your feet.

Hm? You look like a deer in headlights. Hey, don't tell me you forgot about what I said!

How unfortunate. I guess I'll be taking those stars back. I'll just use an eraser and... There we go—all gone.

Don't worry too much. I'll let you keep a small one. You can work your way up from there.

It's okay. As long as we're together, I'm sure we'll make lots of new memories.
88.30150:
"Urgh, if only we could blast outta here on this..."

Vodka stares up at the clear blue skies above her. The scooter's engine has long been revving for action, and Vodka herself looks plenty impatient.

"Hehe, wanna take this baby for a joyride? Y'know, in this getup and all! We could ride tandem along the coast and watch the horizon fly by... or tear down the highway in the middle of the night, the exhaust roaring around us..."

Suddenly, the ring of a church bell fills the air—the reverberations signaling the end of this dreamlike journey. Vodka turns to me and smiles.

"Well, enough with the daydreaming. There's no point in chasing fantasies when we've got enough to chase here in reality. ...But don't think I'm reversing! We're definitely gonna go on that trip one day—just the two of us. We'll ride off on an ordinary day, to nowhere in particular, and laugh our heads off like idiots—you've got my word!"
88.30151:
I mean, I've been looking forward to this for forever.

Whenever I look up, you're right next to me. When I laugh, you laugh right back. If I drag you along 'cause I feel happy, you sigh and follow along.

I wanna spend more time with you. I wanna have more fun. But my eyes won't stay open...

"I'll practice... staying up late... for next time..."

Perhaps this date will continue in her dreams.
88.30152:
The drama. It's too much. Rather than a race, I feel like I'm watching an opera show.

The cheers and applause swell into a song.

This is an epic tale with eight complete acts—and now we've reached its grand finale.

"Hark! I once again declare that I am the one and only Centurial Overlord!"

Alas, you hear it too, do you not? A song proclaiming the deeds of a legend. A song to honor the Centurial Overlord!
88.30153:
I wish this night would never end. The moonlit waves glitter as they gently wash over the sandy shores. It feels like a whole new world.

Like the reflection of stars on the ocean's surface, the blue and yellow never mix. In my hand is a cupful of the sea.

With the two of us in mind, I add a bit of sparkling water to my drink.

The once harsh waves now gently rock the streaks of light on its surface, as if to soothe them.

Sometimes, I think to myself that I need to shine brighter than everybody else.

But when you're with me, I feel like it's enough to just be myself.

In the midst of chaos, the sight of my dearest friend smiling is more precious than anything.

The moon tonight almost reminds me of the sun, warming us both.
88.30154:
"Goodness, is that a photo of when you went to the beach? I see that you went parasailing. It appears you had quite the enjoyable time."

"Oh, it was a blast! The water was so clear that from up in the sky, the fish looked like little jewels, and the dolphins jumped so high they almost reached our gliders! There was even a flock of seagulls gathering around Helios from all the noise she was making."

"Teehee. Regardless... what a wonderful expression, Palmer. Your smile looks so innocent and free—like that of a seabird soaring above the waves, oblivious to gravity..."

"Haha, yeah... A leap of faith'll do that to you sometimes."

"Hehe, how did you take this picture anyway?"

"One of the seagulls stole Helios's phone. But y'know how she gets along with just about anyone, right? Well, the seagull ended up giving it back to her. And when we looked at her camera roll, we found a bunch of photos like this."

"What manner of seagull would do such a thing?! And how did Helios manage to make friends with it?!"
88.30155: The other girls are chatting as they leaf through a fashion magazine. Today, like always, I'm watching them from the edge of the classroom—not that I'm uninterested in their conversation. After all, I quietly follow the fashion influencers I admire on social media. But it doesn't feel like my place to chime in, so I just sit and watch from the sidelines. Even if I were to speak up, I'm sure they would just wonder why I've changed all of a sudden. They'll assume I'm just going with the flow to fit in—or that I'm trying to act more mature than I am. Ding-ding! ♪ I see a notification on my phone screen telling me my favorite influencer has posted an update. Huh? Hey, isn't this Helios?! Helios always appears bright and cheerful in her pictures—but not today. Today, she's a demure lady. "Peep the fresh new drip! Aren't the vibes just immaculate?!" This isn't her usual self. She's refreshingly alluring—like a sophisticated madam. I can tell she's enjoying herself—enjoying the change, as if she appreciates being seen differently by those around her. I used to think that change was scary, but maybe I was wrong. Maybe I should try changing a bit... I could start with the small things... Once again, I look up at at my classmates talking excitedly about the "Best of Umastagram" article before them. "Hey, mind if I join you guys?"
88.30156:
It wasn't all sunshine and rainbows. But nothing ever is, right?

Falling behind, being compared to those around you... The more you obsess, the more you suffer—no matter how much you love what you're doing. If you break, well, then it's all over. And that's no fun.

What's important is that you persevere. Perseverance will eventually bring about good results. You'll find joy and happiness—and you'll certainly have fun.

You just need to keep running. Keep running—no matter how dirty you end up. Even if you're behind on that last corner, you won't lose. You'll pull through—right before the finish line.

Y'know, just like I did today.
88.30157:
I was saved—my whole world was scooped up by their warm hands.

It doesn't matter if no one understands me. My world isn't as dark, cold, or lonely as others think—so leave me alone. This is my safe space, the only place where I can breath. Forcing me out would only make me suffer.

Their gentle hands never tried to drag me out. They carefully held my little world so as not to ruin it.

Today, too, I will watch that bright light from the safety of my world.
88.30158:
Huh? What're you looking at?
Hey, isn't this a picture of our beach party?!

Man, that was a riot! The volleyball match was a blast, I stuffed myself with grilled meat, and the fireworks after sunset were so sick! Oh, and we all got to stargaze after!
Tachyon and Cafe both laughed their asses off too!
Let's do it again sometime!

Hm? Hahahaha! You don't have to look so down!
Sure, the beach party is behind us now. But there's a whole lot more fun where that came from!

C'mon, let's keep going wild! Not just in the summer, but all year round!
88.30159:
Hmph, nice work out there. Are you having fun?
What? Me?
Heh, can't you tell? I honestly didn't think myself capable of feeling this relaxed.

I've discovered a side of myself I didn't know existed.
And I've even met a certain irreplaceable individual.
I suppose miracles like these aren't so uncommon around this time of year.

Ah, right. I forgot to raise a toast. Here's to summer... and the encounters that accompany it. Cheers.
